title: Buy as a Gift - Food Tour
text:
# Buy as a Gift - Food Tour
All of our Secret Food Tours are available for purchase as gifts vouchers, perfect for birthdays, bonuses, holidays, and presents. Codes are valid for 1 year from purchase and you can use them on any Secret Food Tour in any of our 120+ global cities.
Email us at contact@secrettours.com to purchase a gift card.
#### Why are they all in £ GBP?
All the gift cards are in £ because our booking system is in £. However it's only the face value of the gift card, the gift card can be used for any for our tour worldwide and for any currency. And of course, we can pay with any currency of your choice without any surcharge.
#### Do I enter my name or the recipient's name when filling out form?
Enter your name, the gift card can be used by anyone.
#### How do the recipients redeem the tickets?
You will receive an email with a gift card code and the ticket. There is a section during checkout where the recipient will enter their voucher code.
_If you need assistance please_ [_contact_](mailto:contact@secrettours.com) _our customer support._
Checkout
Loading...

title: Join US
text:
# Join US
**Guide**
Are you an experienced tour guide or culinary connoisseur or think you can help/add to Secret Food Tours in any way? Then please email us with details to contact@secrettours.com and put ‘Tour Guide’ in the subject and don’t forget the mention the name of the city.

title: **Health & Safety Standards**
text:
# **Health & Safety Standards**
At Secret Food Tours we take your health and the health of our staff very seriously. To be sure that you can enjoy our tours with the maximum protection we have put in place some strict measures.
We have been certified by We're Good To Go
We make sure that all our partners and our own places are disinfected after each tour
All our guide have been trained on health and safety measures
Masks and hand sanitizers should be used on all our tours by our guides
Guests must bring their own masks
We keep our group small and we offer private tours

Popular Categories:
[A Taste Of Tradition](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/a-taste-of-tradition/) [Amsterdam](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/amsterdam/) [Asian-Inspired Delights](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/asian-inspired-delights/) [Athens](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/athens/) [Atlanta](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/atlanta/) [Aussie Street Food](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/aussie-street-food/) [Australia](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/australia/) [Bangkok](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/bangkok/) [Barcelona](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/barcelona/) [Beer](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/beer/)
What is a food tour?
It’s a walking feast through the heart of a city. Secret Food Tours are led by local guides who know every hidden gem, backstreet bakery, and neighborhood story. You’ll taste iconic dishes, discover spots only locals love, and finish full of both food and insider knowledge. Every tour includes a surprise “Secret Dish” revealed only on the tour.
Do you offer private, group or corporate tours and events?
Yes! We create [private food tours](https://secretfoodtours.com/private-bookings) for couples, families, and corporate groups looking for something special or a unique holiday event. Whether it’s a birthday, team outing, or culinary adventure with friends, we’ll design a custom experience. Just contact us and we can run through your requirements.
How long is the tour, and how much walking is involved?
Most of our food tours last about 3 to 4 hours, with plenty of time to eat, explore, and soak up the city. We keep the pace easy, think neighborhood stroll - not a sprint. There are breaks at each stop and our guides always know where to find a shady bench or a second espresso if you need one. Comfortable shoes recommended, appetite required.
Who should join a food tour?
Anyone who loves to eat, explore, and connect. Our food tours are perfect for solo travelers, couples, families, and groups of friends who want to skip the tourist traps and taste the real city. Our small groups (usually 10–12 people maximum) make it easy to meet others and share the experience. More like dining with friends than following a guide with a flag. We also host private tours for birthdays, team outings, or anyone craving a more custom experience.
What does “small group” mean?
Our food tours usually host around 10 to 12 guests. Just the right size to feel like a group of friends, not a crowd. You’ll have plenty of time to chat with your guide, ask questions, and actually hear the stories behind each stop. Big bus or large groups tours? Not our style.
Why should I book a food tour with Secret Food Tours?
We’re the world’s largest independent food tour company, operating in 120 cities and growing. Each city is run by passionate food lovers who believe the best way to know a place is through its cuisine. Every tour is local-led, filled with authentic stops, and topped off with our signature Secret Dish.
Do you offer gift certificates or can I buy a food tour as a gift?
Of course. Our [food tour gift cards](https://secretfoodtours.com/buy-gift) work for any city around the world - perfect for holidays, birthdays, anniversaries, or that friend who’s always planning their next trip. Even though they are sold in GBP (£), they can be redeemed for any food tour. We also offer **food tour vouchers** for our tours. Our food tour vouchers allow you to purchase the value of a ticket - great to gift! - that can be redeemed at a later date for a ticket to join a tour. Select the gift voucher option when selecting your tour to buy a voucher.

title: Unforgettable Private Food Tours in 120+ Cities
text:
# Unforgettable Private Food Tours in 120+ Cities
[Plan Your Private Tour](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/private-bookings#sign-up)
Whether you’re toasting to another year, reuniting with friends and family, or planning the ultimate bachelor or bachelorette party, we turn your private event or milestone celebration into a flavor-filled adventure.
From VIP experiences to high-energy bachelor and bachelorette parties or intimate family reunions and milestone birthdays, we provide the perfect local backdrop for your private group. Ditch the crowded tourist traps and let us host you at our favorite hidden gems in your city or across the globe. We handle the planning and sharing our local secrets, you just bring the guests.
#### Exclusive VIP Experiences.
Skip the crowds and enjoy an exclusive route with a dedicated local expert and an experience reserved just for your inner circle.
#### Ultimate Group Flexibility.
We adapt to you. Choose your day and start time and let us handle everything for a seamless, stress-free day.
#### Private Events & Celebrations.
From milestone birthdays to bachelor/ette parties, we elevate your special occasion with premium drink upgrades and world-class bites.
## **The Experience is Yours**
When you book a private food tour, the experience is entirely yours. Our local experts tailor the storytelling and the tempo to your group's unique dynamic, ensuring the conversation never stops flowing and the atmosphere is always right.
We know that planning for a group can be a logistical headache, so we’ve made it effortless. We accommodate diverse dietary preferences, handle the scheduling, and ensure every stop is ready for your arrival. From the first bite to the reveal of our "Secret Dish," we provide a premium, private celebration that your friends and family will be talking about for years.
We regularly host:
- **Families & Multi-generational Groups:** A comfortable pace that keeps kids engaged and grandparents relaxed.
- **Bachelor & Bachelorette Parties:** Kick off the festivities with a sophisticated, filling culinary crawl.
- **Milestone Birthdays & Anniversaries:** Make your big year unforgettable with a customized culinary adventure.
- **Solo Travelers & Couples:** A premium, VIP one-on-one experience with a dedicated local expert leading the way.
The best part of your trip shouldn't be the hardest to plan. Our dedicated team handles the logistics so you can focus on the flavors. Simply tell us your vibe, let us coordinate the perfect guide and dietary preferences, and show up ready to eat.

It's just you, me and the loading screen.

## Frequently Asked Questions
What is a private tour?
Private tours are for groups larger than our maximum regular tours that want to tour together, groups that require a specific time or folks that are looking to experience the tours on their own. Many times these tours can be curated to a group’s specific needs so please ask, as we want to make your experience memorable!
Is there a minimum PAX to take a private tour?
No, we can take 1 person on a tour if desired
Is there a maximum tour size?
Depends on the city and sometimes tour timing. We excel at developing solutions to accommodate most requests.
How do I hold a tour date and time?
For independent travellers your tour will be confirmed upon receipt of payment. For large groups and corporate tours we require a (non-refundable 20%) deposit to hold a booking spot
What is the payment policy?
For independent travellers, complete payment is required at the time of booking.
For large or corporate groups we offer two options: a 20% non-refundable deposit paid at the time of booking, with the balance 2 weeks before the tour or we offer a 5% discount if you provide full payment upfront.
What forms of payment do you accept?
1\. Bank Transfer/ Wire Transfer - Amounts are simply transferred from bank to bank through online banking. There are no booking fees.
2\. PayPal - Use your credit card securely through our PayPal® link. Note that a PayPal® service fee of 4.8% is included.
What is the guide tips policy?
While tips are not obligatory they are greatly appreciated by our incredible guides. We are happy to include the gratuity at the time of booking in the amount of your choosing so your group doesn’t need to worry about it and can just enjoy the tour.
What is the cancellation policy?
For groups under 10 guests: Once a tour is booked and paid, it is non-refundable. We understand that plans may shift and we are happy to reschedule your tour at no additional charge (based on availability, of course). Or we can offer credit to be used towards a future Secret Food Tour.
For groups of 10 or more guests: We offer the ability to hold your booking with a non-refundable 20% deposit. The tour must be paid in full 2 weeks prior and at that point is non-refundable. We do offer to reschedule tours, based on availability or can offer credit towards a future Secret Food Tour. For more info please see our Terms and Conditions.
How far in advance do we need to select a date?
Feel free to request a date and if we can accomodate we will, within a 24 hour booking window. If a tour is booked within 2 weeks of tour date, payment will be due in full at time of booking and will be non-refundable.
How much walking (on average) is involved?
Our 5-star rated walking tours are typically 1 to 1.5 miles (1.6 - 2.41KM) and we can adjust this depending on the needs of your private tour needs.
Any age restrictions?
No, we welcome foodies of all ages! However, our alcoholic beverage tours require that guests show a photo ID at the beginning of the tour and must be of legal drinking age in the city of the tour.
Can your tours accommodate dietary restrictions or allergies?
Again this varies tour-by-tour but we absolutely try to provide dietary alternatives where we can. We take food allergies very seriously and request that you provide us with those persons with allergies at the time of booking. Because we work with independent restaurants and food suppliers, we cannot control the potential for cross-contamination and cannot accept responsibility for potential risk of allergen exposure.
Do you offer pick-up and drop off for your tours?
We do offer pick-up/drop-off depending on your exact location for a fee. Please contact us to see if we can accommodate you in this respect.
Are your tours accessible to those with wheelchairs?
Great question! This varies city-by-city so please advise us if any one from your group has mobility issues.

title: **ESSOR LIMITED**  **PRIVACY AND COOKIES POLICY**
text:
# **ESSOR LIMITED**  **PRIVACY AND COOKIES POLICY**
Essor Limited ( **"We"**, **"Us"**) is committed to protecting and respecting your privacy. This Privacy and Cookies Policy ( **"Policy"**) (together with and any other documents referred to therein) sets out the basis on which the personal data collected from you, or that you provide to Us will be processed by Us. Please read the following carefully to understand our views and practices regarding your personal data and how We will treat it.
For the purpose of the General Data Protection Regulation ( **"GDPR"**, from the GDPR implementation date) or, until GDPR implementation date, the Data Protection Act 1998, (collectively the **"Data Protection Laws"**) the Data Controller is Essor Ltd (also trading as Secret Food Tours, Big Easy Food Tours, The Shoreditch Pub Crawl, Paris Bar Crawl).
**YOUR PERSONAL INFORMATION**
Information we collect from you
We collect and process some or all of the following types of information from you in the course of your use of the website or providing our services:
Information that you provide by filling in forms on the website, via e-mail or phone. This includes information provided at the time of purchasing services and/or goods, subscribing to updates, or requesting further information or services. We may also ask you for information when you report a problem with the website.
Specifically, personal details such as name, email address, phone number, dietary requirements, IP addresses or any information input by when using the website, completing our survey forms, using our Services.
In respect of the personnel engaged by our suppliers and resellers (or prospective suppliers and resellers), and with whom we come into contact in connection with the relationship between Us and our reseller and supplier, we will process your contact details such as your name, e-mail address, phone number, place of work and any other information that you provide to us.
If you contact Us, We may keep a record of that correspondence.
We may also ask you to complete surveys that We use for research purposes, although you do not have to respond to them.
Details of your visits to the website including, but not limited to, IP address, traffic data, location data, weblogs and other communication data, and the resources that you access. When using our online form to book and purchase our products your name, e-mail address and phone number are required from you to enable Us to process your order. If you book and purchase our products over the phone your name, e-mail address are required from you to enable Us to process your order. Your name and email address is required from you to enable Us to add you to our mailing list. We will inform you at the point of collecting information from you, whether you are required to provide the information to Us.
**USES MADE OF YOUR INFORMATION**
We use information held about you in accordance with the following "legal bases" and for the following purposes:
To provide you with our website and to carry out any other obligations arising from any contracts entered into between you and Us. We rely on "performance of a contract with you" as the legal basis for this processing.
To notify you about changes to our services or contact you in the case of issues or emergencies in respect of the tour you have purchased. We rely on "performance of a contract with you" as the legal basis for this processing.
If you are engaged by one of our resellers or suppliers, we may process your data in order to perform our obligations pursuant to a contract with that customer or reseller. Where we do so we rely on "legitimate interest" and the legitimate interest is "carrying out a contract with a reseller or supplier".
To provide you with our newsletters. We rely on "consent" as the legal basis for this processing.
We rely on your consent as the lawful basis where you have agreed to participate in a survey, and for the processing of such personal information as has been collected through that survey.
To respond to your enquiries. Where you have contacted us via e-mail or telephone we rely on "legitimate interest" and the legitimate interest is "responding and contacting you regarding the enquiries you have made in relation to the services we offer".
To ensure that content on the website is presented in the most effective manner for you and for the device(s) you use to access and view the website. We rely on "legitimate interest" as the legal basis for this processing, and the legitimate interest is the maintenance and improvement of our website for the benefit of all our users.
To notify you that you have no completed your purchase. Automatic email if they haven't booked, discount code.
To allow you to participate in interactive features of our service, when you choose to do so.
Marketing
We may use information held about you to promote our products and services that may be of interest to you. We will only do this where we reasonably believe that our services may be of interest to you and we rely on "legitimate interest" to promote our products and services to you. This may include instances where you follow us on social media, "like" or "comment" on any of our social media posts, we may use your details to respond back to you with an offer and/or promotional code.
If you do not want Us to use your data in this way please either (i) tick the relevant box situated on the form on which We collect your data (for example, the online purchase form); (ii) unsubscribe from our electronic communications using the method indicated in the relevant communication; or (iii) inform Us at any time by contacting Us at the contact details set out below.
**DISCLOSURE OF YOUR INFORMATION**
We routinely disclose your personal data to our third party service providers, agents, subcontractors and other associated organisations for the purposes of completing tasks and providing services to you on our behalf (e.g. to host our servers).
If you purchase our products via our website payment is handled separately and securely through Ticketing Hub ("Payment Processor"). Your payment card details are never collected by Us. If you want to find out more about how the Payment Processor processes your personal data, you can refer to their own privacy notice.
We may also disclose your personal data to third parties:
in the event that We sell or buy any business or assets, in which case We may disclose your personal data to the prospective seller or buyer of such business or assets; or
if We or substantially all of our assets are acquired by a third party, in which case personal data held by Us about our customers will be one of the transferred assets; or
if We are under a duty to disclose or share your personal data in order to comply with any legal obligation, or in order to enforce or apply our Terms and Conditions; or
to protect Our rights, property, or safety or that of our affiliated entities and our users and any third party We interact with the to provide the website; or
in relation to selected third parties only, only to the extent that you have consented to such selected third parties notifying you about certain goods or services, which may be if interest to you.
Other than as set out above, and save insofar as is necessary in order for Us to carry out our obligations arising from any contracts entered into between you and Us, We will not share your data with third parties unless We have procured your express consent to do so.
**STORING YOUR PERSONAL DATA**
Security
We take appropriate measures to ensure that any personal data are kept secure, including security measures to prevent personal data from being accidentally lost, or used or accessed in an unauthorised way. We limit access to your personal data to those who have a genuine business need to know it. Those processing your information will do so only in an authorised manner and are subject to a duty of confidentiality.
We also have procedures in place to deal with any suspected data security breach. We will notify you and any applicable regulator of a suspected data security breach where We are legally required to do so.
Unfortunately, the transmission of information via the internet is not completely secure. Although We will do our best to protect your personal data, We cannot guarantee the security of your data transmitted to the website; any transmission is at your own risk. Once We have received your information, We will use strict procedures and security features to try to prevent unauthorised access. The Website may, from time to time, contain links to and from the websites of our partner networks, advertisers and affiliates. If you follow a link to any of these websites, please note that these websites have their own privacy policies and terms of use and that we do not accept any responsibility or liability for these policies and terms of use. Please check these policies before you submit any personal data to these websites.
Keeping your personal data up to date
If your personal details change you may update them by contacting Us using the contact details below. If you have any questions about how We use data collected which relates to you, please contact Us by sending a request by email to the contact details below.
We will endeavour to update your personal data within seven (7) working days of any new or updated personal data being provided to Us, in order to ensure that the personal data We hold about you is as accurate and up to date as possible.
How long we keep your personal data
We will hold details relating to any purchase you make, such as your name, e-mail address, IP address for 20 years from the date of the transaction.
In instances where you have not completed a transaction We will hold your contact details for 20 years your details were inputted in this respect.
If you are engaged by one of our resellers or suppliers, we will hold your contact details for the period that supplier or reseller is registered with us and for 20 years after.
Where you have contacted us via e-mail and telephone, We will hold your contact and enquiry details for 20 years.
Where you have participated in our surveys, We will hold your survey details for 20 years.
Where we store your personal data
All information We hold about you is stored on secure servers.
The data that We collect from you may be transferred to, and stored at, a destination outside the European Economic Area ( **"EEA"**). We will take all steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is held securely and in accordance with this Policy. Countries outside the EEA do not have the same data protection laws as the United Kingdom and EEA and we have therefore ensured that any of our suppliers who may transfer your personal data outside the EEA has put in place appropriate measures to protect your data, either by being a member of the US-EU Privacy Shield, or by entering into a European Commission approved contract (as permitted under Article 46(5) of the General Data Protection Regulation).
We will not otherwise transfer your personal data outside the EEA or to any organisation (or subordinate bodies) governed by public international law or which is set up under any agreement between two or more countries. If you would like further information please contact Us (see 'Contact' below).
**YOUR RIGHTS**
Under the [General Data Protection Regulation](https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/PDF/?uri=CELEX:32016R0679&from=EN) you have a number of important rights free of charge.
In summary, those include rights to:
access to your personal data and to certain other supplementary information that this Policy is already designed to address
require Us to correct any mistakes in your information which We hold
require the erasure of personal data concerning you in certain situations
receive the personal data concerning you which you have provided to Us, in a structured, commonly used and machine-readable format and have the right to transmit those data to a third party in certain situations
object at any time to processing of personal data concerning you for direct marketing
object to decisions being taken by automated means which produce legal effects concerning you or similarly significantly affect you
object in certain other situations to our continued processing of your personal data
otherwise restrict our processing of your personal data in certain circumstances
claim compensation for damages caused by our breach of any data protection laws.
For further information on each of those rights, including the circumstances in which they apply, see the [Guidance from the UK Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) on individuals rights under the General Data Protection Regulation](https://ico.org.uk/for-organisations/guide-to-the-general-data-protection-regulation-gdpr/individual-rights/).
If you would like to exercise any of those rights, please:
email at [contact@secrettours.com](mailto:contact@secrettours.com)
let Us have enough information to identify you (name, e-mail address and booking number),
let Us have proof of your identity and address (a copy of your driving licence or passport and a recent utility or credit card bill), and
let Us know the information to which your request relates.
**HOW TO COMPLAIN**
We hope that We can resolve any query or concern you raise about our use of your information.
The [General Data Protection Regulation](https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/PDF/?uri=CELEX:32016R0679&from=EN) also gives you right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority, in particular in the European Union (or European Economic Area) state where you work, normally live or where any alleged infringement of data protection laws occurred. The supervisory authority in the UK is the Information Commissioner who may be contacted at [https://ico.org.uk/concerns/](https://ico.org.uk/concerns/) or telephone: _0303 123 1113_.
**CHANGES TO OUR PRIVACY POLICY**
We reserve the right to modify this Policy at any time. Any changes We may make to our Policy in the future will be notified and made available to you using the Website. Your continued use of the services and the Website shall be deemed your acceptance of the varied privacy policy.
**INFORMATION ABOUT OUR USE OF COOKIES AND IP ADDRESSES**
We may collect information about your mobile phone, computer or other device from which you access the Website including where available your IP address, operating system and browser type, for systems administration and to report aggregate information to third parties affiliates. This is statistical data about our users' browsing actions and patterns, and does not identify any individual. We may, however, use such information in conjunction with the data We have about you in order to track your usage of our services.
Our Website uses cookies to distinguish you from other users of our Website. This helps Us to provide you with a good experience when you browse our Website and also allows Us to improve the Website. By using our Website you agree to our use of cookies as more specifically set out below. A cookie is a small file of letters and numbers that We store on your browser or the hard drive of your computer if you agree. Cookies contain information that is transferred to your computer's hard drive.
The cookies We use include:
**"Analytical"** cookies. They allow Us to recognise and count the number of visitors and to see how visitors move around the Website when they are using it. This helps Us to improve the way our Website works, for example, by ensuring that users are finding what they are looking for easily.
**"Strictly necessary"** cookies. These are cookies that are required for the operation of our Website. They include, for example, cookies that enable you to log into secure areas of our Website, use a shopping cart or make use of e-billing services.
**"Functionality"** cookies. These are used to recognise you when you return to our Website. This enables Us to personalise our content for you, greet you by name and remember your preferences (for example, your choice of language or region).
**"Targeting"** cookies. These cookies record your visit to our Website, the pages you have visited and the links you have followed to our affiliates websites. We will use this information to make our Website, offers e-mailed to you and the advertising displayed on it more relevant to your interests. We may also share this information with third parties for this purpose.
Please note that third parties affiliates may also use cookies, over which We have no control.
You may block cookies by activating the setting on your browser that allows you to refuse the setting of all or some cookies. However, if you use your browser settings to block all cookies (including essential cookies) you may not be able to access all or parts of the Website. Unless you have adjusted your browser setting so that it will refuse cookies, our system will issue cookies as soon as you visit our Website.
**CONTACT**
All questions, comments and requests regarding this Privacy and Cookies Policy should be addressed to [contact@secrettours.com](mailto:contact@secrettours.com) write to Us at ESSOR LTD t/a Secret Food Tours, 86-90 Paul Street, London EC2A 4NE, United Kingdom.

title: Group & Private Tours
text:
## Group & Private Tours
## Frequently asked Questions
What is a private tour?
Private tours are for groups larger than our maximum regular tours that want to tour together, groups that require a specific time or folks that are looking to experience the tours on their own. Many times these tours can be curated to a group’s specific needs so please ask, as we want to make your experience memorable!
Is there a minimum PAX to take a private tour?
No, we can take 1 person on a tour if desired
Is there a maximum tour size?
Depends on the city and sometimes tour timing. We excel at developing solutions to accommodate most requests.
How do I hold a tour date and time?
For independent travellers your tour will be confirmed upon receipt of payment. For large groups and corporate tours we require a (non-refundable 20%) deposit to hold a booking spot
What is the payment policy?
For independent travellers, complete payment is required at the time of booking.
For large or corporate groups we offer two options: a 20% non-refundable deposit paid at the time of booking, with the balance 2 weeks before the tour or we offer a 5% discount if you provide full payment upfront.
What forms of payment do you accept?
1\. Bank Transfer/ Wire Transfer - Amounts are simply transferred from bank to bank through online banking. There are no booking fees.
2\. PayPal - Use your credit card securely through our PayPal® link. Note that a PayPal® service fee of 4.8% is included.
What is the guide tips policy?
While tips are not obligatory they are greatly appreciated by our incredible guides. We are happy to include the gratuity at the time of booking in the amount of your choosing so your group doesn’t need to worry about it and can just enjoy the tour.
What is the cancellation policy?
**For groups under 10 guests:** Once a tour is booked and paid, it is non-refundable. We understand that plans may shift and we are happy to reschedule your tour at no additional charge (based on availability, of course). Or we can offer credit to be used towards a future Secret Food Tour.
**For groups of 10 or more guests:** We offer the ability to hold your booking with a non-refundable 20% deposit. The tour must be paid in full 2 weeks prior and at that point is non-refundable. We do offer to reschedule tours, based on availability or can offer credit towards a future Secret Food Tour. For more info please see our [Terms and Conditions](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/terms-and-conditions/).
How far in advance do we need to select a date?
Feel free to request a date and if we can accomodate we will, within a 24 hour booking window. If a tour is booked within 2 weeks of tour date, payment will be due in full at time of booking and will be non-refundable.
How much walking (on average) is involved?
Our 5-star rated walking tours are typically 1 to 1.5 miles (1.6 - 2.41KM) and we can adjust this depending on the needs of your private tour needs.
Any age restrictions?
No, we welcome foodies of all ages! However, our alcoholic beverage tours require that guests show a photo ID at the beginning of the tour and must be of legal drinking age in the city of the tour.
Can your tours accommodate dietary restrictions or allergies?
Again this varies tour-by-tour but we absolutely try to provide dietary alternatives where we can. We take food allergies very seriously and request that you provide us with those persons with allergies at the time of booking. Because we work with independent restaurants and food suppliers, we cannot control the potential for cross-contamination and cannot accept responsibility for potential risk of allergen exposure.
Do you offer pick-up and drop off for your tours?
We do offer pick-up/drop-off depending on your exact location for a fee. Please contact us to see if we can accommodate you in this respect.
Are your tours accessible to those with wheelchairs?
Great question! This varies city-by-city so please advise us if any one from your group has mobility issues.

title: About Us
text:
# About Us
We are truly passionate about showcasing mouthwatering and irresistible secret foods from all corners of the globe.
Every year, we match people with experienced, local, foodie guides to show thousands of people the best and most delicious foods a city has to offer. Each tour is fun, highly rated, and completely unique to its destination and tour guide — no two tours are the same.
The tour guides take great pride in highlighting the best secret bites loved by locals and overlooked by tourists. Our tours have over **100,000** 5-star reviews, so we know you'll love them too.
Learn about each city's history, how locals buy food, and how food has shaped the area's culture. Each tour features a special Secret Dish selected by the guide that you can only find out about on the tour, with drink upgrades available as well.
Perfect for all ages and all occasions, the guides can't wait to share with you all of our in-the-know secrets. An authentic, unforgettable experience that will leave you full and happy..

title: 5 Reasons to Book a Private Tour:
text:
# 5 Reasons to Book a Private Tour:
## 1\. Personal Guide
Having your own personal guide for your next culinary adventure can make your experience even more special. Those who have been on large group tours will know that getting the care and attention you want from a guide who is trying to accommodate many people simultaneously can be very difficult. With one of our Private Tours, you can relax with the knowledge that your guide will be focussed entirely on your personal enjoyment and satisfaction.
## 2\. Tailored Tours
With a private tour, we’ll be able to customise the experience to your every need. Whether you have specific dietary restrictions, or are interested in a particular route, landmark or cuisine, we’ll be able to create an itinerary that fits the exact experience you’re looking for. Our experience guides are here to make your adventure the best it can possibly be.
## 3\. Built Around Your Budget
If you have a specific budget in mind, we can work around that too and come up with solutions that will provide a great value experience for your money whilst still ticking all the boxes for what you’re looking for in a food or drink tour.
## 4\. The Perfect Add-On Adventure
Oftentimes when you’re visiting a new city, time constraints and busy schedules can mean you might miss out on doing something you’d really love (like one of our food tour experiences.) Whether you’re on a shore excursion, a city break or even a day trip, a private tour will be able to work around your schedule and allow you to get the most out of your quick visits to some spectacular cities.
## 5\. The Gift of Experience
For anyone wondering what to get for their loved ones this year, a Private Tour is the perfect experience that offers a memorable adventure with amazing food and drink, fascinating history, and an immersion into local culture that is difficult to find anywhere else.
[REQUEST A TOUR](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/private-bookings-form)

title: Best Food Tours in Taiwan - Secret Food Tours
text:
# Best Food Tours in Taiwan - Secret Food Tours
# Taiwan
Taiwan is a place where food is part of daily life, from busy night markets to small local spots tucked into city streets. With bold flavors, comforting classics, and a mix of old and new influences, every stop offers something worth tasting.
Join us on a Secret Food Tour and discover some of the best local food experiences Taiwan has to offer. As you explore its lively neighborhoods, you’ll enjoy delicious dishes while getting a real feel for the culture, history, and character that make Taiwan so special.

Popular Categories:
[A Taste Of Tradition](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/a-taste-of-tradition/) [Amsterdam](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/amsterdam/) [Asian-Inspired Delights](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/asian-inspired-delights/) [Athens](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/athens/) [Atlanta](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/atlanta/) [Aussie Street Food](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/aussie-street-food/) [Australia](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/australia/) [Bangkok](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/bangkok/) [Barcelona](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/barcelona/) [Beer](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/blog/category/beer/)
What is a food tour?
It’s a walking feast through the heart of a city. Secret Food Tours are led by local guides who know every hidden gem, backstreet bakery, and neighborhood story. You’ll taste iconic dishes, discover spots only locals love, and finish full of both food and insider knowledge. Every tour includes a surprise “Secret Dish” revealed only on the tour.
Do you offer private, group or corporate tours and events?
Yes! We create [private food tours](https://secretfoodtours.com/private-bookings) for couples, families, and corporate groups looking for something special or a unique holiday event. Whether it’s a birthday, team outing, or culinary adventure with friends, we’ll design a custom experience. Just contact us and we can run through your requirements.
How long is the tour, and how much walking is involved?
Most of our food tours last about 3 to 4 hours, with plenty of time to eat, explore, and soak up the city. We keep the pace easy, think neighborhood stroll - not a sprint. There are breaks at each stop and our guides always know where to find a shady bench or a second espresso if you need one. Comfortable shoes recommended, appetite required.
Who should join a food tour?
Anyone who loves to eat, explore, and connect. Our food tours are perfect for solo travelers, couples, families, and groups of friends who want to skip the tourist traps and taste the real city. Our small groups (usually 10–12 people maximum) make it easy to meet others and share the experience. More like dining with friends than following a guide with a flag. We also host private tours for birthdays, team outings, or anyone craving a more custom experience.
What does “small group” mean?
Our food tours usually host around 10 to 12 guests. Just the right size to feel like a group of friends, not a crowd. You’ll have plenty of time to chat with your guide, ask questions, and actually hear the stories behind each stop. Big bus or large groups tours? Not our style.
Why should I book a food tour with Secret Food Tours?
We’re the world’s largest independent food tour company, operating in 120 cities and growing. Each city is run by passionate food lovers who believe the best way to know a place is through its cuisine. Every tour is local-led, filled with authentic stops, and topped off with our signature Secret Dish.
Do you offer gift certificates or can I buy a food tour as a gift?
Of course. Our [food tour gift cards](https://secretfoodtours.com/buy-gift) work for any city around the world - perfect for holidays, birthdays, anniversaries, or that friend who’s always planning their next trip. Even though they are sold in GBP (£), they can be redeemed for any food tour. We also offer **food tour vouchers** for our tours. Our food tour vouchers allow you to purchase the value of a ticket - great to gift! - that can be redeemed at a later date for a ticket to join a tour. Select the gift voucher option when selecting your tour to buy a voucher.

title: Culinary Tours Kyoto
text:
# Culinary Tours Kyoto
## Kyoto Food Tour - Secret Food Tours
[Home](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/)
Kyoto
This tour starts at Karasuma Oike where the first Starbucks was opened in Kyoto in 1997. From there, you will take the small streets toward the Nishi Market with a tasty stop en route, once at Nishiki your local guide will take you to the authentic and historical food stops avoiding the numerous tourist traps flourishing in this famous market. After crossing the Kamo river you will enter the famous Gion district where your last two stops are waiting for you.
During the three-hours and half culinary tour, our local English-speaking guide will provide you with an experience of local life. On this journey we aim to introduce you to daily Japanese food enjoyed by the locals, with no less than 9 tastings this tour is unlikely to leave you starving nor thirsty. The Nishiki market showcases local groceries, a huge variety of eateries and artisans that have been in business for generations. The tour will finish just by the entrance of the Minami Gion district and a few steps away from the Yasaka Shrine.
Be sure to join our tour hungry! As we progress through our culinary adventure, we will savour a full range of Japanese delicacies, Niigata style Katsudon, Kyoto traditional Yubadofu, a tasting of Kyoto’s region quality sakes wine, freshly made Satsuma age (surimi fish cakes), a beef seared sushi, some fruit mochi (varies accordingly to the season), a Kyoto version of the Okonimyaki, some refreshing or hot matcha tea, and not to mention, our secret dish!!
We want as much as possible to share this wonderful experience with the many so this tour is suitable for non pork eaters, however, for pescatarians and vegetarians some but not everything can be replaced..
If having a meaningful experience in Japan is on your bucket list, then this tour is a must do. Also for those who have or plan on having the Tokyo or Osaka Secret Food tour, our food choices do complete one another and have been selected to offer variations.
## Select Your Adventure
The Tour Guides Take Care Of The Rest
(4.9)
$130.99
The Karasuma and Gion districts are a perfect spot for those who care for local food and cultural exploration. It is an interesting and unique area to dig deep into Kyoto's distinctive cuisine and atmosphere.

title: Bangkok Food Tours
text:
# Bangkok Food Tours
## Bangkok Food Tour - Secret Food Tours
[Home](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/)
Bangkok
Welcome to the street food capital of the world, where every alleyway holds a delicious secret. In Bangkok, food isn’t just a meal; it’s a high-energy way of life that pulses through the city from sunrise until long after the neon woks of Chinatown flicker on. We’re here to help you skip the tourist traps and dive straight into the authentic heart of Thai culinary culture.
Forget what you think you know about Thai takeout. We’ll guide you through the legendary historic streets of Chinatown, known locally as Yaowarat, the birthplace of the city's modern street food scene, where sizzling woks and aromatic spices create a sensory adventure. From the perfect, honey-glazed Moo Ping (grilled pork) to peppery Kway Chap rolled noodles and crispy shrimp dumplings, our tours are designed to spark your curiosity and satisfy your hunger for the real Bangkok.
Whether we’re grabbing a tiny plastic stool for a bowl of authentic duck noodle soup or sampling royal-style steamed buns, you’ll experience the city just like we do. We focus on the stories behind the recipes, the hidden family stalls you’d never find in a guidebook, and the bold, spicy flavors that make a food tour in Bangkok an essential travel experience.

# Istanbul Food Tour
## Istanbul Food Tour - Secret Food Tours
[Home](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/)
Istanbul
Join us on our Istanbul Food Tour and learn how unique Istanbul is as a city and how every scent from a passing street cart is an invitation to explore. As locals who live for the perfect balance of spice and tradition, we don’t just show you the sights, we invite you into the heart of Istanbul’s culinary heritage. Whether we’re navigating the vibrant energy of the Spice Market or crossing continents to the trendy backstreets of Kadıköy, our mission is to reveal the authentic flavors of Istanbul.
An Istanbul food tour is more than just a meal, it’s an adventure through the city. We dive into the bustling Spice Market, teaching you the art of the bargain and the difference between real and fake saffron before tucking into savory köfte meatballs in a hidden hole-in-the-wall. On the Asian side, we explore Kadıköy’s street art and local eateries, sharing traditional menemen and hand-made pide while soaking in the daily rhythm of the neighborhood.
We focus on the history behind the dishes, from the oldest coffee roasteries to family-run stalls where the grilled fish comes straight from the market. Come hungry and ready to discover the secrets on our Istanbul food tours.

Prague
The Czech Republic, also known as Czechia is often called the "Heart of Europe," and its capital Prague is a place where fairytale architecture meets a gritty, vibrant culinary scene. While the views of the Vltava and the astronomical clock draw the crowds, the real magic happens in the narrow, winding alleys of neighborhoods like Malá Strana. This is a place where history is shared over hearty plates and world-class brews that have been perfected over centuries.
Our local culinary guides invite you to step beyond the typical tourist menus to discover the authentic Bohemian lifestyle. We focus on the hidden gems that travelers often overlook, from traditional delis serving iconic open-faced sandwiches to cozy, family-run spots tucked away in historic courtyards. Our mission is to introduce you to the locals keeping our culinary traditions alive.
Whether you're savoring a fragrant soup on a cool day or a perfectly poured Moravian wine, you’ll experience the stories and flavors that make Prague truly unique. Come hungry and ready to dive into the savory secrets of our city.

We ended up having the tour to ourselves, and our guide, David, took us all around Malá Strana. It’s an area we probably wouldn’t have spent as much time in without a guide but I’m so glad we got to learn all about its history. The food we tried was all really tasty and filling. This is less of a food sampling tour and more of a meal tour. No chance you’ll leave hungry from this! David was a great and knowledgeable guide and so fun to spend the morning with. We’d definitely recommend this tour to anyone who wants to find out more about Czech cuisine or Prague in general!

# Melbourne Food Tours
## Melbourne Food Tour - Secret Food Tours
[Home](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/)
Melbourne
Melbourne, Australia is a vibrant city that is renowned for its diverse culinary scene. The city is a melting pot of cultures, and this is reflected in its food offerings. From Asian street food to Mediterranean cuisine, Melbourne has it all. In fact, Melbourne is often regarded as the culinary capital of Australia, and for good reason.
One of the best ways to experience Melbourne's food scene is through a food tour. A food tour will allow you to explore the city's best food spots and discover the hidden gems that only locals know about. You'll be able to taste a wide range of dishes, from traditional Australian fare to exotic international flavors.
Melbourne has a thriving cafe culture, and coffee lovers will be in heaven here. The city's baristas are among the best in the world, and you'll find an impressive range of coffee shops and cafes serving up everything from flat whites to cold brews.
Overall, Melbourne is a must-visit destination for foodies. With its diverse culinary offerings, exceptional coffee, and vibrant food culture, there's something for everyone here. Whether you're a seasoned foodie or simply enjoy trying new things, a food tour in Melbourne is an experience not to be missed.

Our guide, Troy, took the time to get to know us and picked places he knew would appeal to our different tastes.
We ate so much good food and enjoyed some lovely drinks. We finished the tour full and satisfied but not uncomfortably so, with a whole new appreciation for this excellent city.

Dublin
Ireland's unique climate of mild summers and winters, as well as soft rain has allowed the lush 'Emerald Isle' to be blessed with a landscape that provides world class produce.

Did you know Bologna is known around the world as "The Fat City"? Think pasta, lots of pasta... A combination of flavourful ingredients, local produce, old-world knowledge, and a centuries-old passion for food is why Bologna is the country's culinary capital.

Review: Make sure you are hungry!
I had a great experience on this tour. Davide has so much knowledge of Milan and its food and his love of Milan and the Italian food culture shone through. it was also interesting talking to him about other cuisines from travels and living in other countries. I had a great day!

Review: Best food tour!!!
Adam our tour guide was wonderful. He made the tour interesting. He told the history of the area we were in as we walked to the restaurants to taste the special food he picked out for us. The food was delicious especially the pistachio rice ball and the delicious risotto. We loved every minute of the tour.

Review: Don't miss this food tour!
This was an absolutely fabulous tour and Davide could not have been a better guide!! We were a group of 8 from Belguim, Denmark, US, and Canada and we hit it off from the start. Over the course of 7 stops, we tasted arancina (fried rice balls - a specialty of Sicily) stuffed with pistachios and pancetta ; fassona (Italy’s equivalent to wagyu beef) tartare accompanied by caponata, caprese salad and topped off with a glass of Primitivo di Manduria (red wine); risotto with taleggio and pears, classic panzerotta, pasticciotto (pastry stuffed with custard and chocolate), espresso coffee topped with special crema, cannoncino alla crema - a bit like cannoli but with flakier pastry, and seven layer delicacy filled with Almond Sablè, Ganache of White Chocolate Mousse, Pistachio Cream, Sponge Cake, Pistachio Sand, Strawberry Jelly and topped with a Fresh Strawberry. Everything was divine! Not only did we learn about the foods we were tasting, we got a good feel for the culture and history of Italy from Davide. We would highly recommend this tour!

Review: Nice and full
My tour guide Davide was the perfect fit. So friendly, passionate, funny, knowledgable and down to earth. There was a nicely rustic feel walking along the Naviglio Pavese while exchanging anecdotes on history and culture with intermittent stops of authentic gems of earthy Italian street foods from not just Milan but many cities across Italy with an in depth explanation of how food became so diverse in just one country. It’s literally food for thought! The drink upgrade is worth it. The secret dish was far more gourmet than I was expecting! Exquisite. There was also a type of pizza that I have never encountered before and even had a hard time finding on Google that I had on this tour and I’ve got to say it’s my favorite pizza I’ve ever had! Thanks Davide for that recommendation 😋

# Naples Food Tours
## Naples Food Tours - Secret Food Tours
[Home](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/)
Naples
Welcome to the birthplace of pizza and one of the best cities for Italian street food. In Naples, every cobblestone alley tells a story, and every aroma wafting from a busy friggitoria (fried food shop) is an invitation to explore a new flavor. Our Naples food tours are designed for the curious traveler who wants to dive beneath the surface of this gritty, high-energy metropolis to find the authentic flavors that visitors often miss.
Our local guides live for the perfect pizza crust and the freshest pastries, but we don't just show you the sights, we introduce you to the families and artisans who have kept Neapolitan culinary traditions alive for generations.
Whether you’re joining us for a deep dive into the historic center or rolling up your sleeves for a hands-on pizza-making class, you’ll experience the warmth and hospitality that makes Naples feel like home. stacy p
Review: Secret Food Tours porto
We had a wonderful private tour with Marta. Our family of 5, adults and kids, enjoyed all of the stops and conversation. Marta went out of her way to shape the tour to appeal to the adults AND the kids. She is so well informed about Porto, the food and the history. We had just arrived in town and she had a lot of advice and was really great about answering all of our questions. She did a fantastic job at relating and speaking to our teens and timing everything comfortably. She never made us feel rushed and was very professional with all of the vendors and people that we visited. We have taken many food tours in many cities in Europe- this Porto tour was nice because we were able to visit each place- going inside and sitting and eating with Marta. Some other tours that we have taken, we were not allowed to enter shops and guides brought us out tastings at each stop. This felt much more intimate, comfortable and a better put together tour. Thank you Marta and the team at Secret Food Tours Porto.
Sara M
Review: Secret Food Tours porto
My husband and I joined the Secret Food Tour in Porto on a Wednesday in March - low season, so we were the only two people on the tour. Our guide, Carlos, was really friendly and informative, full of interesting insights into the food and culture of the beautiful city of Porto. We especially enjoyed visiting the temporary market (where stall-holders are being housed while the old Bolhao market building is refurbished) and sampling Porto's signature Francesinha sandwich. The tour lasted close to 3.5 hours, but the time whizzed by as we wandered at leisurely pace, listening to Carlos' stories. Our only criticism would be that we'd have preferred to have just one, rather than two, sandwich type dishes, so the tour could have included a greater variety of typical foods. For example, we were surprised not to try any dishes containing Bacalhau, which seems to be so central to Portuguese cuisine, or anything with tripe/offal, which Porto locals are known for eating. Overall, though, this was still a very enjoyable way to spend a morning and a good introduction to the city.
Evie L
Review: Secret Food Tours porto
Porto was amazing... In recent times the secret food tour has always been first on our agenda and having done them in several European destinations we were very excited at the prospect of another. Knowing a little about the history of the place we upgraded with the extra drinks package... Being the only two on the tour was fabulous - secret food tour always comes through on that front and Carlos was engaging,interesting, knowledgeable and thorough with the supportive information with the locations excelling in their Portugese nature. There was no quibble about the duration - it was wonderfully prolonged - however was this the reason we didn't have/eat 'the secret dish' as the tour description promises? However despite the upgrade in drinks we didn't seem to receive the extra glass of vinho verde nor the large beer with the francesinha… I think we had a large port but who knows? Overall it WILL NOT prevent us from booking further tours in other locations but it may make us more guarded in upgrading at what seems to be cost without benefit?
rockydogz1
Review: Secret Food Tours porto
What an incredible experience with Carlos who mixed in local food knowledge with an incredible history lesson. Every stop was focused on the history and actual recipes in making the local dishes.
Sue
Review: Secret Food Tours porto
My husband and I had a great time with Marta on our private food tour through Porto. Marta shared amazing food, drink, and history of the city. Being the only ones on the tour really allowed us to ask all the questions we wanted and really get to know the city and Marta. We learned about and tried the famous Bifanas sandwich and the Francesinha sandwich. We enjoyed sardines, cod, green wine, and Super Bock. Ending the day with some Port and chocolate down by the river. There was so much food and drink - don't eat before you go. It was a great tour to do upon arrival. Marta gave us great recommendations and helped us get acclimated to the city. We would highly recommend this tour.

We skip the tourist traps on our Seville food tour to lead you straight to the authentic soul of the city found in the alleys of the Casco Antiguo - the historic center - and the spirited riverbanks of Triana.
We connect you to the flavors that define life here. Focusing on family-run taverns where locals share plates of prized Iberian jamón and glasses of chilled Sherry. From the perfect morning churro to rich, slow-cooked oxtail stew, our tours dive deep into culinary traditions shaped by centuries of history.
Join our food tour in Seville to uncover hidden convent sweets and the city’s best Tinto de Verano. We invite you to skip the guesswork and experience an unforgettable, flavor-packed journey through the real Seville with us!

# San Sebastian Food Tour
## San Sebastian Food Tour - Secret Food Tours
[Home](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/)
San Sebastian
San Sebastian: mouthwatering food, pretty buildings, and white sandy beaches. What more does one need?!? Imagine a smaller Paris, located on the water, with way fewer tourists, more relaxed, and with a Basque twist. This city is renowned throughout Spain for its award-winning chefs, who turn dishes into works of art, and for its pintxos - a unique style of tapas from the Basque Country, served in individual portions on platters.
If you are into gastronomical experiences and consider yourself a real foodie, you won’t be disappointed.

# Food Tours in Dallas
## Dallas Food Tour - Secret Food Tours
[Home](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/)
Dallas
Welcome to Dallas, where the hospitality is as big as the sky! Recently named _Bon Appétit’s_ Restaurant City of the Year, Dallas has exploded into a world-class culinary destination. Our team of local experts is ready to show you why a Dallas food tour is the ultimate way to experience this Texas gem.
From the vibrant, mural-filled streets of Deep Ellum to the beautiful views of downtown Dallas, we take you straight to the spots locals love. You’ll experience the rhythm of the city as we introduce you to legendary traditions like "cowboy style" BBQ and the spicy kick of authentic Tex-Mex.
On every food tour in Dallas, we prioritize high-quality, local ingredients prepared by our local food partners. Whether you’re digging into a perfectly seasoned brisket, savoring a classic street taco, or treating yourself to a slice of drunken pecan pie, we ensure every bite tells a part of the Texas story. Join us to see Dallas through a local’s eyes and leave with a belly full of memories. Come hungry!

Tracy F
Review: Secret Food Tours Dallas
Great walk around Deep Ellum with Harley, learning history and eating way too much awesome food. My two young adult sons joined me on this tour, and really enjoyed it as well. We made five food stops, trying a little bit their most famous dish at each. Queso, tacos, chicken & pancakes, brisket and pie. The brisket was hands down our favorite - melt in your mouth good. The guys at Terry Black's BBQ were great, and gave us taste tests on a couple of things since it wasn't too busy. The smoked turkey was also out of this world. We also made a stop at Rudolph's Butcher Shop, a real throwback to an earlier era. Fun way to explore an up & coming area of the city, and eat great food. Don't miss it!
Aimee M
Review: Secret Food Tours Dallas
So much fun, even in the rain. Harley was an amazing tour guide. The history, the murals, the food was unbelievable... the entire experience was fantastic!! The queso at Pepe and Mitos was amazing ! The Brisket at Pecan Lodge was delicious! The hot chicken and pancake was scrumptious! The chili dog was YUMMY and the Pecan Pie was outstanding. Rudolph’s Meat Market was a treasure from the past. Deep Ellum is rich in culture, food, music and art. I highly recommend this tour ! Harley was an outstanding guide.
nina
Review: Secret Food Tours Dallas
I have never really enjoyed meat, but after the first BBQ stop on this tour I understand why New York (my hometown) is not famous for BBQ and Dallas is. I mean wow. All the food was excellent at every stop, even the stuff I thought I wouldn't care for. I won't give away the secret stop, but it was totally unexpected (didn't think it was the kind of place to exist in Texas) and it was my favorite stop. Our guide, Harley, is a Dallas local who really knew his history and pointed out cool places that he recommended visiting after the tour. He was very friendly and totally willing to help with all my touristy questions, even for things completely irrelevant to the tour. My tip: don't schedule dinner after. You will be STUFFED by the end.

"The Key to the Caribbean," it has earned its reputation among travelers from all over the world because it offers an experience you won't find anywhere else. Bursting with historic sites, beautiful architecture, never-ending parties… and even pirate treasures!
This tiny island served as a pivotal hub for shipping and trade in the Caribbean, bringing together a myriad of cultures and influences, as well as fresh ingredients and culinary traditions. This makes Key West a cultural and gastronomic treasure in itself.
With its identity shaped by Cuban, American, Bahamian, and African immigrants, Key West has become a must-visit location for foodies... But beyond that, it has created its own culinary signature!
In the present day, Key West's culinary scene remains vibrant, offering a mix of classic and contemporary dining establishments that serve a wide range of incredible dishes, from seafood delicacies to innovative fusion cuisine.

title: Miami Food Tour - Secret Food Tours
text:
## Miami Food Tour - Secret Food Tours
[Home](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/)
Miami
At the core of Miami lies Little Havana, a neighborhood where the bold aroma of Cuban coffee and the steady rhythm of domino games instantly set the tone. While the city is often known for its beaches and nightlife, this historic district is where Miami’s cultural identity truly comes to life, rooted in tradition, resilience, and a food culture built across generations.
This Little Havana Food Tour offers a three-hour journey into the stories, flavors, and everyday life that shape iconic Calle Ocho. Tracing the path from the Cuban exile movement of the 1960s to the vibrant street art and music scene of today, the experience reveals how history continues to influence the neighborhood’s present.
Stretching along Calle Ocho, the tour follows the area’s main corridor and cultural backbone. Throughout the walk, you’ll encounter local artisans and culinary experts, from cigar rollers safeguarding age-old techniques to family-run spots serving the dishes that define Cuban cuisine in Miami. Each tasting highlights authentic flavors, including savory classics and sweet tropical finds tucked inside neighborhood ventanitas.
Filling the streets with energy, the sounds of salsa and the steam of a freshly poured cafecito create the perfect backdrop for exploration. Whether pausing to watch a heated domino match at Domino Park or discovering a hidden local favorite, you’ll quickly see why Little Havana remains one of the city’s most treasured neighborhoods.
Come explore the flavors, stories, and traditions that make this area so special arrive hungry for discovery and leave with a local’s perspective.

title: San Francisco Food Tours
text:
# San Francisco Food Tours
## San Francisco Food Tours - Secret Food Tours
[Home](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/)
San Francisco
San Francisco is a city of fog, steep hills, and a culinary scene that defines West Coast flavor. While most visitors flock to the piers, we take you where the real magic happens, into the kitchens of family-run dim sum spots and the Italian bakeries that have smelled like sourdough for a century.
We’ll share the way immigration has shaped our "City by the Bay," creating a patchwork of flavors you won't find anywhere else.
Our San Francisco food tours dive deep into the neighborhoods that make this city legendary. In Chinatown and North Beach, we bridge two worlds in one afternoon, uncovering the secret to perfect dumplings before stepping into "Little Italy”.
If you’re craving a taste of the Mission, we’ll show you the birthplace of the oversized burrito and the vibrant Latin roots that keep this district's heart beating.
From the historic Barbary Coast to the colorful murals of the Mission District, we don't just eat, we share the stories of the 49’ers, the beats, and the modern innovators.

I appreciated her choice of restaurants, savoring the local flair as we learned a bit of the immigrant history of SF. I recommend this tour to anyone seeking a different experience of the city and for sure to those who appreciate good food!

We made a friend! I highly recommend Secret Food Tours and a big bonus if Eduardo is your guide!
Tara
Secret food Tours Mexico City
Amazing tour! Eduardo is a fantastic tour guide that is very knowledgeable about his city and his country. The food was excellent and we hope to return to some of the places while we are in Mexico City. We highly recommend this tour and Eduardo.
Carl C
Secret food Tours Mexico City
The food tour gives both an insight to the gastronomy, and the culture of the Country. We had Eduardo as a guide, and he was knowledgeable and passionate in both food and culture, and was able to answer all our questions. We went to a range of different places, many of which we would have never found on our own (or via tripadvisor for that matter), and the food we tasted was delicious. We can only recommend taking the tour!
Libby
Secret food Tours Mexico City

We highly recommend this tour!
Jim Nastic
Secret food Tours Mexico City
First of all we would like to thank Eduardo for this wonderful experience and all the time he spent to show us around to get to know all these delicious Mexican foods. We never fell rushed and had a lot of time at each food stop. We got to know a lot about the neighbourhood and Eduardo also answered all our questions we had about Mexico City. It was really nice and one of our highlights in Mexico! And... I’m still thinking about the delicious octopus taco. It was one of the best tacos I had during our whole 3 week Mexico vacation (you definitely need to include the great toppings you can choose from yourself). All in all, thank you really much for this tour. We wish you all the best Eduardo! :)

## Ho Chi Minh City Food Tour - Secret Food Tours
[Home](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/)
Ho Chi Minh City (Saigon)
Ho Chi Minh City (still lovingly known as Saigon) is a paradise for food lovers, where every corner tempts you with mouthwatering aromas and bold, unforgettable flavors.
This city is a feast for the senses, no matter the season!
March and April are especially exciting, marking the start of Vietnam’s agricultural year. It’s the time when markets overflow with just-harvested treasures—fragrant herbs, vibrant fruits, and crisp, garden-fresh vegetables.
These ingredients take Ho Chi Minh City’s already incredible dishes to a whole new level of deliciousness.
If your heart beats for food and travel, Ho Chi Minh City isn’t just a destination - it’s a culinary pilgrimage. Come hungry, and prepare to fall in love with every bite!

Kayan has a very friendly and enthusiastic personality and made me feel very comfortable in talking to him and asking questions. I give Kayan five stars for all of the above, plus His professionalism and genuine love of the job. I have a few other points regarding the tour, however. I believe that a shift should be made so we don’t have two donuts to just start out our tour. I would suggest something like one doughnut or Italian pastry, and then something along the lines of. guacamole and chips or a taco. . It would make the food selection much better. I also was very bothered by the tour guide not having access to any of the foods, because for me, it felt uncomfortable eating with the group and the Tour guide was not offered any food. My last comment is that a bottle of water should be supplied. Overall, kudos to Kayan as he made the tour a lot of fun. I do recommend this secret food tour, but maybe a few. tweaks, as suggested would make it even better.
Donna Flynn
Review: Secret Food Tours Fort Lauderdale
We really enjoyed our food tour with Kayan! He was fun and knowledgeable! Very friendly and my sister and I felt like we knew him all our life. It was a great tour and I would recommend it to others. If I had anything that I would have liked differently it would be the 2 doughnut stops. It was too much to start the tour with 2 desserts. I personally didn't even try to eat the second doughnut or I wouldn't have been able to eat anything else. I would again like to give a shout out to Kayan for his upbeat personality and his kindness!! He made the tour really fun!!

# Savannah Food Tours - Secret Food Tours
## Savannah Food Tours - Secret Food Tours
[Home](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/)
Savannah
Welcome to Savannah, a city where history isn't just written in books—it's served on a plate. As locals, we know that the true heart of the "Hostess City" beats in its kitchens, where centuries-old recipes meet fresh, local ingredients. Our mission is to guide you beyond the guidebooks and into the authentic eateries that define our culinary landscape. We skip the tourist traps to focus on genuine Southern hospitality, connecting you with the chefs and storytellers who keep our traditions alive.
Whether you are craving the comfort of soul food, the brine of fresh Atlantic seafood, or the sweetness of a handmade confection, we curate experiences that celebrate the best of the Lowcountry. We specifically focus on the walkable Historic District, allowing you to immerse yourself in the architecture and atmosphere between bites. Our tours showcase the diverse influences that shaped our food, from Gullah Geechee heritage to British colonial roots. Come hungry for food and history, and let us show you why Savannah tastes like nowhere else on earth.

title: What you'll do
text:
## What you'll do
On our Secret Food Tour: Krakow, you'll explore our rich history of royal feasts and simple fare, with family stories told around the table. Each traditional dish is prepared with high-quality ingredients and served with the warmth and hospitality of the locals.
Enjoy traditional Polish dishes, starting from the Jewish Quarter with its incredible squares, cafés, and local restaurants. Dine on authentic Pierogi, local sausage and soup, smoked sheep’s cheese, and enjoy a shot of famous local flavoured vodka at a traditional bar. All this along with our Secret Dish and we guarantee you will fall in love with the city of Krakow.
Quality drinks will be served at some stops, however if you would like more, a thoughtfully curated [Upgraded Drinks Package](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/krakow/upgraded-drinks-package/) is available.
### SEE ITINERARY
We start the tour in the Jewish Quarter where you'll try a typical Zapiekanka - local flatbread pizza.
Visit one of the oldest bars in Krakow for a classic honey-flavoured vodka.
We'll stop at a 100-year-old Polish restaurant to discover the most beloved local soup.
Visit an authentic historic milk bar (communist-era cantine) for Poland's legendary Pierogi.
Head to the biggest medieval square in Europe and visit a local pub to sample some Polish beer and Bigos.
Sample Oscypek - highlanders’ smoked sheep cheese - with cranberry jam, and get ready for a sweet treat to finish the tour.
As with all our tours, there's also a delicious Secret Dish.
When you purchase our Upgrade Package, you'll enjoy the following drinks, in addition to the ones already served on the tour:
A shot of wormwood vodka
Polish mulled beer
[ADD UPGRADED DRINKS PACKAGE](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/krakow/upgraded-drinks-package/)
\*Please note: the itinerary and menu is subject to change, based on the locations' availability, weather, and other circumstances.
\*Please note: We can’t accommodate pets on our food tours.
Book Your Tour
€79.99 / person
Lowest price guarantee
If you have any issues with payment, please email us at [contact@secrettours.com](mailto:contact@secrettours.com) with the city, date and time of tour, and how many adult and child's tickets you need so we can assist you.
**If a tour is fully booked, or you are looking to book a \*Group or Private Tour - please email us about [Group & Private Tours](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/private-bookings) options.**
\*Please note - Group & Private Tours are specifically organised for your group and therefore subject to a premium price.
Looking to gift a memorable experience?
We've got you!
[Buy as a gift](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/buy-gift/)
What you'll taste
### THE FOOD
Zapiekanka - local flatbread pizza
Beetroot soup and Polish sausage
Traditional pierogi
Bigos - Polish hunter’s stew
Oscypek with cranberry jam - smoked sheep cheese
Polish doughnut with traditional rose jam
Our Secret Dish
### THE DRINKS
Honey-flavoured vodka
Polish beer
Kompot - homemade fruit drink
Non-alcoholic beverages for those who don’t consume alcohol
For more drinks see upgrade above
Meeting Spot
We'll meet at the Plac Nowy 4b, 31-056 Kraków - Right in Front of Zapiekanki BarOko. Please [email us](mailto: krakow@secrettours.com).
Plac Nowy 4b, 31-056 Kraków - Right in Front of Zapiekanki BarOko
[See on Google Maps](https://maps.app.goo.gl/vC5qFFksy5ErZV157)
Mon - Sat 10:00 a.m.
Your guide will be waiting with an orange umbrella so they are easy to spot.
## WHY THE JEWISH QUARTER AND THE OLD TOWN?
We start in Kazimierz, once an independent Polish town, which became known as the Jewish Quarter of Krakow. Here you'll see plenty of cool bars, vintage stalls, and bohemian cafés – in addition to somber reflections from World War II. From there we take a walk to reach the Old Town, a very magical place. For many centuries, kings, queens, and their guests came to Krakow through St. Florian's Gate, past the Main Market Square, and continued along Grodzka Street to Wawel Castle. Today, the Royal Route is still as vibrant and lively as ever, retaining its royal splendor. Here you’ll find perfectly preserved medieval architecture — some of the most magnificent in Europe — including stunning residences, centuries-old churches, majestic university buildings, and the Renaissance castle and gardens at Wawel Hill.
The Main Market Square, Rynek Glówny, is the heart of the city, designed eight centuries ago to meet the needs of merchants. Today, the taverns and inns that once surrounded the centre have been replaced by restaurants, clubs, and coffee shops, and in the centre of the square stands the Cloth Hall, with stalls selling local souvenirs, artwork, and jewelry.
[\\
BOOK NOW!](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/krakow/food-tours-krakow/#BOOKING)

## What you'll do
_Due to the nature of creating a well balanced and thoughtful gastronomy experience, many of our tours are unable to accommodate certain dietary restrictions. Please_ [_contact us_](mailto:krakow@secrettours.com) _prior to booking your tour to see if we are able to accommodate your dietary needs._
### SEE ITINERARY
A shot of wormwood vodka
Traditional flavoured vodka. There are many versions and some recipes have been passed down through generations; each producer can use its own recipe. In Poland Piołunówka is considered a cure for problems with the digestive tract and is believed to enhance appetite. Therefore, traditionally it is consumed in small amounts.
Polish mulled beer
Grzaniec, also known as Grzane Piwo (Hot beer) is exactly that. It is beer that is mulled and served hot – not cold, not warm. This will also contain added spices and ingredients to give it a unique zesty flavour, in this case you'll try it with raspberry or ginger flavour!

## WHY MOURARIA?
We chose the Mouraria district for one of our Lisbon food tours because of the area's authentic restaurant scene, historical culture, and charming ambiance. Mouraria is still one of the most traditional neighborhoods in Lisbon, with tascas filled with homemade food. In the past, Mouraria was a Moorish ghetto, but now it is known as the birthplace of Fado, a style of traditional Portuguese music. What makes Mouraria even more distinctive is that it withstood the devastating 1755 earthquake and therefore preserves many of its beautiful original tiles.
Join us on our Secret Food Tour in Lisbon and enjoy stunning views over the city as you indulge in delicious Portuguese dishes.

You’ll savour everything from traditional petiscos and fresh seafood to the iconic Pastel de Belém, all while discovering the culinary traditions that have shaped this historic district.
As you stroll past iconic landmarks, such as the Jeronimos Monastery and the Monument to the Discoveries, you’ll experience a neighbourhood known for its vibrant food scene, where street vendors and fine dining coexist in harmony. In the past, Mouraria was a Moorish ghetto, but now it is known as the birthplace of Fado, a style of traditional Portuguese music. What makes Mouraria even more distinctive is that it withstood the devastating 1755 earthquake and therefore preserves many of its beautiful original tiles.
