title: What you'll do
text:
## What you'll do
On our Secret Food Tour: San Antonio, you'll discover a picturesque foodie oasis that winds its way through the heart of Texas' second largest city.
Our experienced guides will take you on a foodie adventure through bustling Downtown San Antonio, an area steeped in more than 300 years of history and heritage! On your journey, you'll sample an array of handmade hispanic specialties at family-owned businesses and see where the locals eat while avoiding chain restaurants and tourist traps. Throughout the experience, you'll learn firsthand what "Tex-Mex" actually is while enjoying it in the city in which it originated while also being enchanted by local landmarks such as San Fernando Cathedral, the River Walk, and the Alamo along the way. In fact, we're pretty sure that you'll remember more than that storied building by the time your journey is complete!
Food will be served with water when available. Or if you prefer, a thoughtfully curated [Upgraded Drinks Package](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/san-antonio/upgraded-drinks-package/) is available for purchase.
### SEE ITINERARY
We'll begin at The Historic Market Square of San Antonio.
First up, you'll start your day like the locals do, you'll savor a delicious local favorite taco served on a warm handmade tortilla at a family-owned taqueria.
Next we begin a short walk through the Historic Downtown, discovering local history and some sightseeing.
After which, you'll discover a unique twist on our beloved "bean burger" at the city's #1 burger joint. .
Now it's time to walk off some calories as we pass by some of our breathtaking architectural gems such as San Fernando Cathedral and the Bexar County Courthouse.
Of course, no visit to San Antonio would be complete without taking time to explore the enchanting River Walk, Texas' #1 tourist attraction.
Alongside the river, you'll experience Smoked Turkey.
And finally, it's time to cool down with a scoop of handmade sorbet or gelato as we make our way to our city's most memorable monument - the Alamo!
As with all our tours, there's also our delicious Secret Dish.

## WHY DOWNTOWN?
San Antonio is one of the oldest Spanish settlements in Texas, and for a while, it was its largest city. It's also home to some of Texas' most important landmarks, such as the Alamo, which all happen to reside in its vibrant city center. This is the birthplace of Tex-Mex, our first and only UNESCO World Heritage site, and home to our #1 tourist attraction - the River Walk! Within just a few blocks, you can feast on some of the very best tacos ever, explore 300 year old missions and cathedrals, and be transported to an Instagramable urban oasis! What more could you ask for?!
So, whether you're here for the history, the vibes, or you're just plain hungry, Downtown San Antonio's got you covered and it won't be long before you realize why we're the most-visited city in all of Texas.
[\\
BOOK NOW!](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/san-antonio/food-tours-san-antonio/#BOOKING)
## Frequently Asked Questions
How do I order?
It’s easy! Simply head to our "Book Now" page, where we detail our tours. Select your tour and the time of your tour and book it! Are you looking for something special or organising an event? Just email us at [sanantonio@secrettours.com](mailto:sandiego@secrettours.com) and we will do our best to arrange something that suits you. After your booking is made, we will send you an email confirmation. If you have any questions before booking, feel free to contact us via email or phone us at +1 323 628 8222\*Please note if you are using a special promo code then enter it in the "Voucher Code" section before you select the amount of tickets you would like to purchase
\*Please note if you are using a special promo code then enter it in the **"Voucher Code"** section before you select the amount of tickets you would like to purchase\*
What is included in the food tour?
All the delicious food and drinks mentioned above, but if you want more alcohol (and who doesn't?) we offer an [upgraded drinks package](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/san-antonio/upgraded-drinks-package/) that gives you a Mexican hot chocolate, a local craft beer, and a refreshing cocktail.
Where is the meeting spot?
You can find the [meeting spot here](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/san-antonio/food-tours-san-antonio/#CONTACT) and if it's not clear you can always contact us.
We will meet across from the Entrance of Mi Tierra at 218 Produce Row, San Antonio, TX 78205. Your guide will be there with an orange umbrella and a big smile!
Where the tour will end?
Our tour ends in front of the Alamo at 300 Alamo Plaza, San Antonio, TX 78205.
Is your food tour suitable for a vegetarian or someone with other dietary requirements?
Due to the nature of creating a well-balanced and thoughtful gastronomy experience, many of our tours are unable to accommodate certain dietary restrictions. Please contact us at [sanantonio@secrettours.com](mailto:sanantonio@secrettours.com) prior to booking your tour to see if we are able to accommodate your dietary needs.
I am traveling with my family, is the tour ok for infants/children?
Children are more than welcome to our tour if of an appropriate age to enjoy.
I don't drink alcohol. Can I book your tour?
This is not a problem. Just inform our guide before the tour starts. During the tasting you can select another beverage you like.
Is there enough food during your tour?
Our tours provide our customers with a lot of food. Trust us, you will not need to eat a meal after our food tour!
Where do I add my discount voucher?
I would like to take your tour but it is already fully booked. Is there a way I can do the tour?
Our tours are often sold out very quickly. If the date you requested is not available, please do not hesitate to email us and we can see if there is anything we can do.
Is there a lot of walking?
To join our food tour, you must wear comfortable shoes. There will be around 42 minutes of walking but it's not too difficult and there are no hills or stairs. If you walk slowly, then our guide will walk slowly as well.
How many people max are on this tour?
We take 15 people maximum. If you are more than 11 people, please do not hesitate to email us and will try to see if we can accommodate.
I cannot find a way to print the confirmation. Is it OK if I have it on my phone?
You do not have to print your voucher. A confirmation on your phone will be fine!
If I purchase a voucher as a gift, or am given a voucher how long is it valid for?
All of our vouchers expire one year from the date of purchase.
Can I choose my own cheese and meat?
Our guide will take care of everything. Should you wish to try something special, please inform our guide and they will do their best to make you happy.
Where does your food come from?
We work with small shops and family owned businesses in the downtown area. The food and drink we buy is top-quality, fresh and local!
What if it rains or I change my plans?
Fortunately, the weather is predictable in San Diego. We do not issue refunds as per our terms and conditions. We also inform you that we never cancel a booking even if we only have 2 people! However we do reserve the right to cancel the tour if we feel the weather is extreme, and we cannot run the tour due to this. For more info see our [Terms and Conditions](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/terms-and-conditions/).
Can I pay the tour in cash?
You must book directly on our website. We do not accept cash payments. Our online payment is safe, secured and SSL protected.
Why do we need to pay for a booking fee?
The booking fee that you have to pay is up to our ticket provider and we can't change it. All our clients need to pay for it upon booking. The booking fee charged contributes to the cost of the ticketing system to provide an excellent service to our customers.
Foreign Transaction Fees
A few banks have charged their customer an extra fee while booking with us (this isn't the booking fee but another fee added by the bank). We think this is unfair, if this happens let us know by showing us in your bank statement and we will refund this fee as a gesture of good will.
Can i get a discount
If you are a group of 11 people, then you can email us, we will be more than happy to give you a discount.
Are the food tours wheelchair and/or stroller accessible?
Many of our tours are not wheelchair or stroller accessible. We recommend contacting us before booking to discuss this specific tour and accessibility options.
What is the lowest price guarantee?
We always offer the lowest price on our Secret Food Tours. If you find one of our food tours listed at a lower price, contact us and we'll match it.
## READY TO TASTE THE REAL San Antonio?

\*Please note if you are using a special promo code then enter it in the **"Voucher Code"** section before you select the amount of tickets you would like to purchase\*
What is included in the food tour?
All the delicious food and drinks mentioned above, but if you want more alcohol (and who doesn't?) we offer an [upgraded drinks package](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/san-antonio/upgraded-drinks-package/) that gives you a Mexican hot chocolate, a local craft beer, and a refreshing cocktail.
Where is the meeting spot?
You can find the [meeting spot here](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/san-antonio/food-tours-san-antonio/#CONTACT) and if it's not clear you can always contact us.
The meeting spot is in front of the former San Antonio Children's Museum at 305 E Houston St, San Antonio, TX 78205. Your guide will be there with an orange umbrella and a big smile!
Where the tour will end?
Our tour ends in front of the Alamo at 300 Alamo Plaza, San Antonio, TX 78205.
Is your food tour suitable for a vegetarian or someone with other dietary requirements?
Due to the nature of creating a well-balanced and thoughtful gastronomy experience, many of our tours are unable to accommodate certain dietary restrictions. Please contact us at [sanantonio@secrettours.com](mailto:sanantonio@secrettours.com) prior to booking your tour to see if we are able to accommodate your dietary needs.
I am traveling with my family, is the tour ok for infants/children?
Children are more than welcome to our tour if of an appropriate age to enjoy.
I don't drink alcohol. Can I book your tour?
This is not a problem. Just inform our guide before the tour starts. During the tasting you can select another beverage you like.
Is there enough food during your tour?
Our tours provide our customers with a lot of food. Trust us, you will not need to eat a meal after our food tour!
Where do I add my discount voucher?
I would like to take your tour but it is already fully booked. Is there a way I can do the tour?
Our tours are often sold out very quickly. If the date you requested is not available, please do not hesitate to email us and we can see if there is anything we can do.
Is there a lot of walking?
To join our food tour, you must wear comfortable shoes. There will be around 42 minutes of walking but it's not too difficult and there are no hills or stairs. If you walk slowly, then our guide will walk slowly as well.
How many people max are on this tour?
We take 15 people maximum. If you are more than 11 people, please do not hesitate to email us and will try to see if we can accommodate.
I cannot find a way to print the confirmation. Is it OK if I have it on my phone?
You do not have to print your voucher. A confirmation on your phone will be fine!
If I purchase a voucher as a gift, or am given a voucher how long is it valid for?
All of our vouchers expire one year from the date of purchase.
Can I choose my own cheese and meat?
Our guide will take care of everything. Should you wish to try something special, please inform our guide and they will do their best to make you happy.
Where does your food come from?
We work with small shops and family owned businesses in the downtown area. The food and drink we buy is top-quality, fresh and local!
What if it rains or I change my plans?
Fortunately, the weather is predictable in San Diego. We do not issue refunds as per our terms and conditions. We also inform you that we never cancel a booking even if we only have 2 people! However we do reserve the right to cancel the tour if we feel the weather is extreme, and we cannot run the tour due to this. For more info see our [Terms and Conditions](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/terms-and-conditions/).
Can I pay the tour in cash?
You must book directly on our website. We do not accept cash payments. Our online payment is safe, secured and SSL protected.
Why do we need to pay for a booking fee?
The booking fee that you have to pay is up to our ticket provider and we can't change it. All our clients need to pay for it upon booking. The booking fee charged contributes to the cost of the ticketing system to provide an excellent service to our customers.
Foreign Transaction Fees
A few banks have charged their customer an extra fee while booking with us (this isn't the booking fee but another fee added by the bank). We think this is unfair, if this happens let us know by showing us in your bank statement and we will refund this fee as a gesture of good will.
Can i get a discount
If you are a group of 11 people, then you can email us, we will be more than happy to give you a discount.
Are the food tours wheelchair and/or stroller accessible?
Many of our tours are not wheelchair or stroller accessible. We recommend contacting us before booking to discuss this specific tour and accessibility options.
What is the lowest price guarantee?
We always offer the lowest price on our Secret Food Tours. If you find one of our food tours listed at a lower price, contact us and we'll match it.
## READY TO TASTE THE REAL San Antonio?
Book our award-winning Upgraded Drinks Package in San Antonio before it fills up!

The Old Town of Naples stands out as one of Napoli's most lively areas. This vibrant district hosts a lively open-air market where street vendors showcase a dazzling array of fruits, vegetables, fish, and delectable treats. Amidst this lively scene, you'll encounter charming artisan shops, a bustling nightlife, captivating street art, and a strong sense of community.
Exploring the Decumani District is a must for a truly comprehensive Napoli experience. Named after the old Roman streets, Decumani constitutes the historic heart of the city. ## What you'll do
Immerse yourself into hundreds of years of history through food in the Puerto Rican capital of Old San Juan. The city has acted as the gateway to the Caribbean for over 500 years and its rich culinary scene tells the story of the many cultures and traditions that influenced it..
Begin your journey in Plaza Colón, which previously served as the entry into this walled city, where you'll meet your expert local guide. From here, you'll dive right into the sites and tastes of Old San Juan.
You'll sip on the pride of Puerto Rico, its amazing local coffee which has been grown and brewed on the island for centuries. You'll taste local sandwiches made on artisan sweet bread, as well as the national dish of Puerto Rico hailed by locals and celebrities worldwide. Finish the tour with a sweet treat to cool you down on a sunny San Juan day overlooking the harbor that gave Puerto Rico its name. With over 5 local tastings, your appetite is sure to be satisfied as your taste buds will experience the best of this rich and unique culinary scene .
Quality drinks will be served at some stops, however if you would like more, a thoughtfully curated [Upgraded Drinks Package](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/san-juan/upgraded-drinks-package/) is available.
### SEE ITINERARY
you'll meet your guide at the centrally located Plaza Colón near Fort San Cristobal which served as the gateway to Old San Juan
Your expert local guide will guide you through the vibrant, historical center of the centuries old city
First, you'll sip on Puerto Rico's famous coffee grown in the mountains just outside of San Juan paired with a classic sandwich on their famous sweet bread
Next, an empandilla, a Puerto Rican staple of on-the-go dining made fresh daily
Then, you'll enjoy a freshly squeezed juice made with local fruit and a famous appetizer that traces its history back to the days when pirates sailed the waters around Puerto Rico
No tour of San Juan is complete with the national dish: Mofongo! you'll enjoy one of the best in San Juan and learn why this dish is loved by celebrities the world over
With all our experiences there is always a Secret Dish!
Upgrade your Secret Food Tour: San Juan, experience with three drink selections chosen to pair with the food you'll be served. You must be 18 and older and have a valid ID.
An upgraded coffee
The national cocktail of Puerto Rico: the Piña Colada
A seasonal cocktail selection

Plaza Colon
[See on Google Maps](https://maps.app.goo.gl/N5J5ScQA4uWQDXHm9)
Daily 11:00 a.m.
Your guide will be waiting with an orange umbrella so they are easy to spot.
## WHY OLD SAN JUAN?
Old San Juan is one of the oldest cities in the new world and is one place where Christopher Columbus landed on his 1493 voyage. It wasn't until 1521 when it became a regularly inhabited city, but quickly became a bustly trade post as a safe harbor before entering the Caribbean.
As it grew, the walled city became a hub of cultural exchange and the food reflected that. The culinary scene in Old San Juan borrows from the indigenous Taino people, the Spanish Empire of centuries past, African traditions from slaves brought to Puerto Rico, and even pirates who roamed the waters off its coast.
Through it's cobblestone streets, colorful buildings, and incredible cuisine, Old San Juan is a perfect setting to get a taste of Puerto Rico in just a few hours. Combined with beautiful views of its harbor and Atlantic ocean, historic forts, massive walls, and eclectic food scene, a food tour of Old San Juan is sure to be an unforgettable experience.
[\\
BOOK NOW!](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/san-juan/san-juan-food-tour/#BOOKING)
## Frequently Asked Questions
How do I order?
That is very easy! Go to our "Book Now" page, where we detail our tours. Select your tour and the time of your tour and book it! Are you looking for something special or are you organizing an event? Just email us at [Group & Private Tours](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/private-bookings) and we will do our best to arrange something that suits you. After your booking is made, we will send you an automatic e-mail confirmation. If you have any questions before booking, feel free to contact us via email
\*Please note if you are using a special promo code then enter it in the **"Voucher Code"** section before you select the amount of tickets you would like to purchase\*
What is included in the food tour?
All the delicious food and drinks mentioned above, but if you want to upgrade your experience with a premium coffee and alcoholic cocktails, you can! We offer an a href="/san-juan/upgraded-drinks-package/">upgraded drinks package for purchase as well.
Where is the meeting spot?
Your tour will meet at Plaza Colon. Look for your guide holding an orange umbrella near the fountain on the south end of the plaza across from the Teatro Alejandro Tapia y Rivera. .
Where the tour will end?
The class will end on the west end of Old San Juan, steps away from the governor's mansion known as La Forteleza
Is your food tour suitable for a vegetarian or someone with other dietary requirements?
Due to the nature of creating a well-balanced and thoughtful gastronomy experience, many of our tours are unable to accommodate certain dietary restrictions. Please contact us at [sanjuan@secrettours.com](mailto:sanjuan@secrettours.com) prior to booking your tour to see if we are able to accommodate your dietary needs.
I am traveling with my family, is the tour ok for infants/children?
Yes, we can definitely accommodate children but it is not recommended for any children or infants who require strollers.
I don't drink alcohol. Can I book your tour?
Yes, only the upgraded drinks package for this tour includes alcohol. Your standard ticket will include select non-alcoholic drinks.
Is there enough food during your tour?
Yes, there are multiple tastings enough to satisfy a full meal!
Where do I add my discount voucher?
I would like to take your tour but it is already fully booked. Is there a way I can do the tour?
Our tours are often sold out very quickly. If the date you requested is not available, please do not hesitate to email us and we can see if there is anything we can do.
How many people max are on this tour?
Our tours have a maximum of 14 guests. If you are more than 14 people, please do not hesitate to email us and we will try to accommodate you.
I cannot find a way to print the confirmation. Is it OK if I have it on my phone?
You do not have to print your voucher. A confirmation on your phone will be fine!
If I purchase a voucher as a gift, or am given a voucher how long is it valid for?
All of our vouchers expire one year from the date of purchase.
CAN I CHOOSE MY OWN FOOD?
Our host will take care of everything. Should you wish to try something special, please inform us via [sanjuan@secrettours.com](mailto:sanjuan@secrettours.com) before booking and we will do our best to make you happy.
What if it rains or I change my plans?
Unfortunately, the weather is unpredictable and temperatures in San Juan are typically above 80F (26C) every day. Most days are sunny, but very short rain storms are common. We do not issue refunds as per our terms and conditions. We also never cancel a booking even if we have only 2 people! However we do reserve the right to cancel the tour if we feel and we cannot run the tour due to extreme weather for more info see our [Terms and Conditions](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/terms-and-conditions/).
Can I pay the tour in cash?
You must book directly on our website. We do not accept cash payments. Our online payment is safe, secured and SSL protected.
Why do we need to pay for a booking fee?
The booking fee that you have to pay is up to our ticket provider and we can't change it. All our clients need to pay for it upon booking. The booking fee charged contributes to the cost of the ticketing system to provide an excellent service to our customers.
Foreign Transaction Fees
A few banks have charged their customer an extra fee while booking with us (this isn't the booking fee but another fee added by the bank). We think this is unfair, if this happens let us know by showing us in your bank statement and we will refund this fee as a gesture of good will.
Are the food tours wheelchair and/or stroller accessible?
Many of our tours are not wheelchair or stroller accessible. We recommend contacting us before booking to discuss this specific tour and accessibility options.
What is the lowest price guarantee?
We always offer the lowest price on our Secret Food Tours. If you find one of our food tours listed at a lower price, contact us and we'll match it.

title: WHAT TO EXPECT ON OUR WALKING FOOD TOUR OF SCOTTSDALE
text:
## WHAT TO EXPECT ON OUR WALKING FOOD TOUR OF SCOTTSDALE
Join Secret Food Tours on a food tour through Downtown Scottsdale. You'll dine in a number of locally owned restaurants, trying some of their signature dishes.
Learn the story of a city that started with mere citrus grove and became the leading destination for luxury resorts and fine dining. At the end of your Scottsdale food tour, you'll have sampled some of this city’s most unique dishes that shaped the southwest and gained a better understanding of its culture and history.
Your Scottsdale food tour starts here as you imagine everything you’ll see and all the delicious dishes you’ll try. All the food will be served with water.
### SEE ITINERARY
We'll start at The Little Red School House, to find where the foundation of Scottsdale was laid.
Next, you will find a Mexican staple that helped build this town, literally!
As we walk through old town we will then stop at the only Indigenous restaurant in the region to meet the 3 sisters who shaped cuisine as we know it!
For something a little more quenching, take refreshment with an authentic Chocolate Malt shake straight out of the past!
Just around the corner we will travel farther west for a little Island food from Scottsdales top tiki restaurant
Our longest walk yet will lead you through even more hidden gems to the last food stop that is the secret of secret cuisine here in Scottsdale, Arizona!
We will end at the 5 horse fountain; where beauty, intelligence and grace intertwine both animal and city with this unmatched tribute.
When you purchase our Upgraded Drinks Package, you'll enjoy the following in addition to the drinks already served on the tour:
Painted Desert
Hula’s Painkiller
Fendi Bindi
Painted
Hawaiian Mai Tai
Feni Bendi

## WHY THE WATERFRONT/OLD TOWN SCOTTSDALE?
While Scottsdale is world renown for relaxing resorts featuring spas and lush golf courses, they also have an eclectic array of activities from the arts to rodeos and everything in between. The food scene is nothing short of extensive. Whether you’re looking for finely tuned Tapas, Kus Kus or a hearty plate of good ole fashion Mexican enchiladas, Scottsdale is where you want to be!

## Frequently Asked Questions
How do I order?
That is very easy! Go to our "Book Now" page, where we detail our tours. Select your tour and the time of your tour and book it! Are you looking for something special or are you organizing an event? What is included in the food tour?

Where is the meeting spot?

Is your food tour suitable for a vegetarian or someone with other dietary requirements?
You can always tell our guide of any food allergies or special dietary requirements so that way we will adapt the menu so you can enjoy the tour! If you have any doubt or concerns, feel free to email us at [scottsdale@secrettours.com](mailto:scottsdale@secrettours.com) before booking. There is no alcohol on this tour. Just inform our guide before your tour starts if you have any special request.

There is a lot of food on this tour and we recommend a light or no meal prior. As we travel you get many delicious treats that comprise a meal. Trust us, you will not need to go to any restaurant after the Food tour!
Where do I add my discount voucher?
I would like to take your tour but it is already fully booked. Is there a way I can do the tour?
Our tours are often sold out very quickly. If the date you requested is not available, please do not hesitate to email us and we can see if there is anything we can do.
Is there a lot of walking?
To join our food tour, you must wear comfortable shoes. There will be around 30 minutes of walking, but it is not too difficult and is broken up between food stops. If you walk slowly, then our guide will walk slowly as well. In case you have any issues walking, we recommend you get in touch to try booking a Private tour.
How many people max are on this tour?
We take 12 people maximum. If you are more than 10 people, please do not hesitate to email us and we will try to see if we can accommodate.
I cannot find a way to print the confirmation. Is it OK if I have it on my phone?
You do not have to print your voucher. A confirmation on your phone will be fine!
If I purchase a voucher as a gift, or am given a voucher how long is it valid for?
All of our vouchers expire one year from the date of purchase.
Can I choose my own cheese and meat?
Our guide will take care of everything. Should you wish to try something special, please inform our guide and they will do their best to make you happy.
Where does your food come from?
Top - quality, fresh and local! From Vendors and restaurants. All vendors are carefully regulated so that the food will be safe to eat.
What if it rains or I change my plans?
Unfortunately, the weather is unpredictable in Scottsdale. We do not issue refunds as per our terms and conditions. We also inform you that we never cancel a booking even if we have only 2 people! However we do reserve the right to cancel the tour if we feel the weather is extreme, and we cannot run the tour due to this for more info see our [Terms and Conditions](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/terms-and-conditions/).
Can I pay the tour in cash?
You must book directly on our website. We do not accept cash payments. Our online payment is safe, secured and SSL protected.
Why do we need to pay for a booking fee?
The booking fee that you have to pay is up to our ticket provider and we can't change it. All our clients need to pay for it upon booking. The booking fee charged contributes to the cost of the ticketing system to provide an excellent service to our customers.
Foreign Transaction Fees
A few banks have charged their customer an extra fee while booking with us (this isn't the booking fee but another fee added by the bank). We think this is unfair, if this happens let us know by showing us in your bank statement and we will refund this fee as a gesture of good will.
Are the food tours wheelchair and/or stroller accessible?
Many of our tours are not wheelchair or stroller accessible. We recommend contacting us before booking to discuss this specific tour and accessibility options.
What is the lowest price guarantee?
We always offer the lowest price on our Secret Food Tours. If you find one of our food tours listed at a lower price, contact us and we'll match it.

title: What You’ll Do
text:
## What You’ll Do
On our Secret Food Tour: Seattle, you’ll embark on a culinary journey through the heart of the city—Pike Place Market. Prepare to indulge in a handpicked selection of Seattle’s most beloved local flavors, including the iconic Northwest clam chowder and a variety of artisanal items crafted by local makers.
As you explore one of the largest and most vibrant craft food markets in the United States, you’ll be immersed in its lively, colorful atmosphere. Along the way, you'll meet passionate vendors and producers who embody the spirit of Seattle’s culinary community.
Your experience continues as we guide you through the historic DownUnder, a hidden lower level of the market where locals shop and generations of North Pacific fishermen have left their mark. This insider glimpse offers a deeper understanding of the traditions and culture that shape Seattle’s food scene.
### SEE ITINERARY
We will start with an unconventional cheesy affair that’s a little salty and a little sweet with a bit of spice. Guaranteed to intrigue even the most discerning of palates.
Next, wrap yourself in a flaky pastry with a recipe centuries old. An Indian and Russian fusion filled with fresh ingredients; this decadent treat will have you coming back for more.
A tour in Seattle would NOT be complete without adding some coffee into the mix. Not any ordinary café, experience a local artesian coffee from locals who have been in the market since 1982.
At our next stop we will dive into the infamous Northwest Clam Chowder, one that has won numerous awards. Come spectacle, leave satisfied!
Close by we will find a vendor who has been here from the very beginning. In those humble beginnings we will taste the perfection in the simplicity that keeps locals coming back everyday.
Further into the market we will enjoy a German based street food with a twist that only Seattle could pull off.
Further exploration into the market we will uncover items hidden from enchanting stories, both old and new.
At our last stop, immerse yourself in an unexpected fruitful delight.
As with all of our unique experiences, there will be a secret bite along the way!
Book Your Tour
$69.99 / person
Lowest price guarantee

We will meet next to Sur La Table next to Post Alley located at 84 Pine St. Seattle, WA 98101. Our guide will send a text prior to the start of the tour and will be waiting for you with an orange umbrella. If you have any questions please do not hesitate to email us.

Your guide will be waiting with an orange umbrella so they are easy to spot.
## WHY Seattle?
On our Secret Food Tour: Seattle, you’ll discover a savory local cuisine deeply influenced by the city’s surroundings and by the multicultural and international populations who live here. From the Chinese Cantonese spices and flavors, to some Indonesian “Pho” finishing with a variety of North Pacific sea bites.
We’ll show you the local habits and uses, starting from taking the seafood from the dock directly from the fisherman who caught it, ending up trying some fresh and delicious oysters, crab and the famous seafood “chowder” in the old traditional style of the city.
We’ll let you discover the characteristic Pike place market, one of the biggest craft markets in the country, where you’ll enjoy colorful and mouth-watering products, meeting local farmers, butchers, bakers and winemakers, who will be delighted to introduce you to the real Seattle food and wine culture.
[\\
BOOK NOW!](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/seattle/food-tours-seattle/#BOOKING)
Our sightseeing and food tours are the perfect way to discover the hidden gems of this vibrant city. From the Space Needle to Pike Place Market, we'll show you the best of Seattle while providing an insider's perspective on its history and culture. Our knowledgeable guides will keep you entertained with stories and jokes while ensuring that you have a truly unique experience.

title: What you'll do
text:
## What you'll do
On our Secret Food Tour: Tampa, you'll enjoy a variety of classic bites.
From award winning Cuban sandwiches and deviled crab to a Greek specialty dish, our experienced guides will take you through Ybor City, a vibrant neighborhood where history and modern culture collide in the best way possible. Originally founded by Cuban, Spanish, and Italian cigar manufacturers in the late 1800s, Ybor has held onto its roots while evolving into a lively hub for food, music, and art. Think cobblestone streets lined with vintage cigar shops, fusion restaurants, and trendy bars that pulse with Latin jazz and live rock well into the night. Day or night, you'll see an eclectic crowd strolling past colorful murals, exploring century-old buildings, or gathering in outdoor cafés under the soft glow of string lights. From the bustling 7th Avenue to its hidden alleys and parks, Ybor City exudes an old-world charm blended with a bold, contemporary edge that feels like a little slice of Havana right in the heart of Tampa.
Plus, don't forget about our Secret Dish, a bite with a bite that kicks off our food journey!
All the food will be served with water and at times, a non-alcoholic beverage. Or if you prefer, a thoughtfully curated [Upgraded Drinks Package](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/tampa/upgraded-drinks-package/) is available.
### SEE ITINERARY
You'll begin your journey with a bang, chomping on our Secret Dish, an exotic bite that is truly a Florida-Only experience.
We’ll meander over to one of the oldest restaurants in Florida, known for its rich Cuban cuisine, which has been enchanting guests since 1948. There you'll indulge in their world famous Cuban, Tampa's iconic sandwich, filled with roast pork, ham, swiss cheese and pickles, all pressed to a crispy, crunchy taste sensation between fresh baked cuban bread.
Next up, we'll take you to Tampa locals' favorite where you'll indulge in their deviled crabs, stuffed with blue crab, paprika and garlic.
From there, you'll discover the secrets of Ybor City, with its colorful history and pirate connections.
We stop in at a local diner for avgolemono while experiencing the Greek tradition of hospitality, or philoxenia, which permeates many dining establishments, where meals are social experiences enjoyed among family and friends.
Now it's time to stroll through the palm tree lined streets of 7th Avenue, the heart of Ybor City, as we peek into the fabulous local shops and cigar crafters, and enjoy the incredible people watching.
We wrap up our time together with lush, handcrafted ice cream. The perfect foil to the Florida heat.
Tampa, nestled along Florida's Gulf Coast, is a vibrant city known for its rich cultural diversity and culinary scene. With influences from Cuban, Spanish, and Italian heritage, the food in Tampa is a flavorful fusion of traditional and innovative dishes.
Strawberry Lemongrass Spritz
Guava Colada
Local Craft Beer

## Why Ybor City?
Visiting Ybor City is like stepping into a lively slice of history with a vibrant cultural twist. Known as Tampa's "Latin Quarter," Ybor offers a unique blend of old-world charm, diverse food, and buzzing nightlife that’s hard to find anywhere else. Originally a cigar manufacturing district founded by Cuban, Spanish, and Italian immigrants, it has preserved much of its historic architecture and atmosphere. You will stroll down 7th Avenue, a National Historic Landmark District, where you’ll find vintage cigar shops, colorful murals, and century-old brick buildings filled with trendy restaurants, bars, and unique boutiques.
Ybor City captures a spirit that’s rich, diverse, and unlike anywhere else in Florida.

## WHAT TO EXPECT ON OUR WALKING FOOD TOUR OF TUCSON
Join Secret Food Tours on a food tour through downtown Tucson. You'll dine in a number of locally owned restaurants, trying some of their signature dishes.
Learn the story of a city that started with open spaces and rich agriculture and became an eclectic part of the southwestern United States. At the end of your Downtown Tucson food tour, you'll have sampled some of this city’s most delicious dishes and gained a better understanding of its culture and history.
Your Tucson food tour starts here as you imagine everything you’ll see and all the delicious dishes you’ll try. All the food will be served with water.
### SEE ITINERARY
We'll start at The Mercado, an authentic Mexican marketplace, where you will sample a classic Mexican pastry.
Next, you will find a delectable Sonoran treat made to perfection.
Step inside a new era of where East meets West with Tucsons award winning Elote Pizza.
For something lighter, take refreshment with a local favorite, where you will cool down with an expertly crafted tea!
On our walk, you will see some local and national creative artistry up close and personal and hear the stories of how a humble farming village transformed into a vibrant, creative community.
And finally, you’ll be diving deeper into historic downtown before sampling our secret dish.
Discover flavor, culture, & variety on this Tucson food tour from Secret Food Tours.

# Secret Food Tours Washington D.C.
 Skip the overpriced tourist traps
 Uncover the city's history and culture
 Exclusive food tours in over 90 cities worldwide
Discover Washington D.C. with our top-rated guided food tour, which takes you to delicious, lesser-known food spots loved by locals
Also recommended by
 3 - 3½ hours
 Washington's Georgetown
 4/5 stops
 12 people max
 English
## What you'll do
Stroll through historic Georgetown's scenic streets as the aroma of fresh pastries, sizzling half smokes, and artisan bites lead the way. On this guided food walking tour, you will sample local favorites from a family-run eatery, discover hidden gems tucked behind historic facades, and hear the captivating stories about the neighborhood's storied past. From its canal days to its vibrant culinary scene. Each stop layers flavor with history, making it the perfect blend of culture, cuisine, and charm.
All the food will be served with water or if you prefer, non-alcoholic beverages. A thoughtfully curated [Upgraded Drink Package](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/washington-DC/upgraded-drinks-package/) is available.
### SEE ITINERARY
First, our expert guide will introduce you to our tour and the history and architecture of Georgetown. You will pass by the famous Georgetown University - a beacon of academic excellence and one of the United States' most distinguished institutions of higher learning.
Following that, you'll have the chance to dine at a restaurant situated in a delightful Federal-style townhouse dating back to the mid-1800s. Delight in a timeless dish that possesses a unique and subtle tie to the history of Washington, D.C.
Next, enter the realm of film history at the legendary horror movie location, a place forever etched in the annals of the silver screen. Take in the awe-inspiring views of the Francis Scott Key Bridge and embark on a leisurely stroll down NM Avenue, an absolute must-see destination in Washington, D.C.
Continuing on your gastronomic journey, prepare to be pleasantly surprised by a staple of Washington, D.C.'s food identity at an unconventional venue.
Following that, immerse yourself in the enchantment of the Georgetown Waterfront Gate Complex. It's one of the coolest spots in Georgetown, brimming with beautiful natural sights, modern architecture, and, of course, history.
Finally, no food tour of Georgetown would be complete without indulging in a beloved cupcake that has captured the hearts of locals and visitors alike.
As with all our tours, there's our delicious Secret Dish.
Locally Crafted Kombucha
Local Beer
Season Cocktail

We believe that it's impossible to have a complete visit of Washington D.C. without exploring Georgetown, as it has the most to offer in terms of culture, history and of course delightful food. This historic neighborhood dates from 1745 and now is full of chic boutiques, international and American restaurants. This area is experiencing a rebirth in terms of food scene, pubs and fun. This is the place everyone goes for fun in Washington D.C.

title: What you'll do
text:
## What you'll do
[Tour disponible en español](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/mexico-city/food-tours-mexico-city-es/)
Journey through all facets of Mexican cuisine, from "Grandma's" kitchen, keeping alive traditional recipes, to totopos freshly made by artisans, and the delicious taste of trendy tacos.
Our tour starts in a local Mexican restaurant for your first taste. We'll walk towards the Zocalo, a charming square brimming with history, stunning architecture, culture, and delicious food.
The old town is the perfect area to experience the colorful atmosphere and discover the vibrant flavors and variety of authentic Mexican cuisine.
At the end of your tour, you'll have sampled some of Mexico City's most delicious dishes and gained a better understanding of our culture and history.
Quality drinks will be served at some stops, however if you would like a full experience, a thoughtfully curated [Upgraded Drinks Package](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/mexico-city/upgraded-drinks-package/) with 2 authentic Mexican cocktails is available.
_Due to the nature of creating a well balanced and thoughtful gastronomy experience, many of our tours are unable to accommodate certain dietary restrictions. Please_ [_contact us_](mailto:mexico@secrettours.com) _prior to booking your tour to see if we are able to accommodate your dietary needs._
### SEE ITINERARY
As our food journey begins we start taking a view at an open-air market, where we'll being the Mexican way, with chilaquiles: known as a staple in Mexican cuisine(as well as brunch culture in SoCal and Texas), Chilaquiles goes all the way back to the Aztecs.
Next, we'll indulge in a classic Mexican dish renowned for its rich history: enchiladas smothered in a flavorful mole sauce.
Afterwards, we'll stroll through one of the shopping areas in the historic center, discovering where the locals purchase their beautiful decorations.
We'll then savour some super crispy homemade totopos dipped in the one and only king of dips, guacamole, right in its country of origin.
At the same time, get ready to indulge in the vibrant flavours of of authentic tacos at one of the locals' most beloved spots: those ones might stick to your heart forever.
Each bite promises a delicious journey through the rich culinary traditions of Mexico!
We'll also sample something sweet at a popular local bakery.
We'll conclude our journey with a local artisanal chocolate bite, reminding you that cocoa definitely originated in Mexico.
Plus, don't forget our secret dish—it's not to be missed!
Michelada
MEZCALITA

title: What you'll do
text:
## What you'll do
Journey through all facets of Mexican cuisine, from abuelitas recipes, keeping alive traditional recipes, to Tlayudays freshly made in a local spot, and the delicious taste of the famous black Mole.
Our tour visits 2 local markets for tour delight - Mercado 20 de Noviembre and Mercado Benito Juarez - before walking towards the Zocalo - the charming square brimming with history, stunning architecture and culture. Oaxaca old town is the perfect area to experience the colorful atmosphere and discover the vibrant flavors and variety of authentic Mexican cuisine.
At the end of your tour, you'll have sampled some of Oaxaca's most delicious dishes, strolled through the cutest streets, and gained a better understanding of our culture and history.
A unique, typical drink will be served during our tour, however if you would like more, a thoughtfully curated [Upgraded Drinks Package](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/oaxaca/upgraded-drinks-package/) is available.
_Due to the nature of creating a well balanced and thoughtful gastronomy experience, many of our tours are unable to accommodate certain dietary restrictions. Please_ [_contact us_](mailto:oaxaca@secrettours.com) _prior to booking your tour to see if we are able to accommodate your dietary needs._
### SEE ITINERARY
Our food journey begins with typical foods in the historical cities of Oaxaca, followed by an amazing bite at the famous Mercado 20 de Noviembre in Oaxaca.
If you like, we'll let you try your first Chapulines - Mexican fried grasshoppers - to fully understand the meaning of "don't knock it 'til you try it".
We'll indulge in a classic Mexican dish renowned for its rich history and unique to this city: our special Mole Negro.
Then, while stroll through streets and markets, we'll have try another round of delectable bite: the one and only Oaxacan quesillo and a sweet treat.
Cocoa plays a huge role in Oaxaca's culinary scene, so as we walk towards the Zocalo and the downtown area, we'll ensure everyone honors Hispanic ancestral traditions by tasting it in two very different ways.
Afterwards we will continue walking through the historical and charming streets until we find the last  three bites of our tour in another area of town: two savory and a sweet one.
Oaxaca is famous for its terraces, so we'll visit one of the most charming ones, a beloved local spot that might just steal your heart.
Each bite promises a delicious journey through the rich culinary traditions of Mexico's food capital!
Plus, don't forget our Secret Dish - it's not to be missed

## WHY OAXACA HISTORICAL CENTER AND 2 MARKETS?
Oaxaca Historical Center is part of the rich tapestry of Mexico's political, social, cultural, and artistic heritage. Wander through the vibrant local markets, Mercado 20 de Noviembre, famous for its food stalls offering a rich variety of traditional Oaxacan dishes, and Mercado Juarez, known for its diverse selection of local crafts, fresh produce, and everyday essentials. These markets offer a glimpse into the heart of Oaxacan daily life and culinary traditions, making them must-visit spots in the grand Zócalo, where history and culture come alive.
The Old Town is an ideal setting to savor authentic, delicious cuisine amidst the architectural marvels of Oaxaca de Juarez. Experience the unique local atmosphere that attracts Mexicans from all regions and tourists alike, shaped by decades of significant events.
Here you'll also see the grand Zócalo and Plaza de Santo Domingo, where history and culture come alive: you'll discover some of the coolest and cutest streets in the world.

## WHY OAXACA HISTORICAL CENTER AND 2 MARKETS?
Oaxaca Historical Center is part of the rich tapestry of Mexico's political, social, cultural, and artistic heritage. Wander through the vibrant local markets, Mercado 20 de Noviembre, famous for its food stalls offering a rich variety of traditional Oaxacan dishes, and Mercado Juarez, known for its diverse selection of local crafts, fresh produce, and everyday essentials. These markets offer a glimpse into the heart of Oaxacan daily life and culinary traditions, making them must-visit spots in the grand Zócalo, where history and culture come alive.
The Old Town is an ideal setting to savor authentic, delicious cuisine amidst the architectural marvels of Oaxaca de Juarez. Experience the unique local atmosphere that attracts Mexicans from all regions and tourists alike, shaped by decades of significant events.
Here you'll also see the grand Zócalo and Plaza de Santo Domingo, where history and culture come alive: you'll discover some of the coolest and cutest streets in the world.

# Kimchi Cooking Class in Seoul
 Skip the overpriced tourist traps
 Uncover the city's history and culture
 Exclusive food tours in over 90 cities worldwide
Discover Seoul with our top-rated guided food tour, which takes you to delicious, lesser-known food spots loved by locals
Also recommended by
 2 hours
 36 Jahamun-ro 7-gil, Jongno, Seoul
 8 people max
 English Speaking
## What you'll do
Join us in a hidden gem location near the iconic Gyeongbokgung Palace, where you’ll embark on a hands-on journey into creating three authentic kimchi-inspired dishes in our Korean Kimchi Making & Seoul Cooking Class.
Led by a professional Korean chef, this small-group class offers an immersive introduction to the bold flavors and culinary techniques that define Korean cuisine.
You'll learn to prepare classic recipes using traditional methods, all while gaining insight into the cultural importance of fermented foods like kimchi.
Whether you're a curious traveler or a passionate home cook, you'll leave with new skills, a deeper appreciation for Korean food culture and of course a full belly, thanks to the delicious meal you’ll enjoy at the end of class with your fellow food lovers.
_A quality drink will be served, however if you would like more, a thoughtfully curated_ [_Add Upgraded Drinks Package_](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/seoul/cooking-upgrade/) _is available._
### SEE ITINERARY
Meet your chef near Gyeongbokgung Palace in a hidden cooking studio. Tucked just steps from Seoul’s most iconic landmark, this welcoming kitchen is where your cooking class in Seoul begins.
Discover the ingredients behind Korea’s bold, balanced flavors. Before your cooking class, your chef will walk you through the key components of Korean cuisine. From fermented staples to fragrant seasonings - explaining their cultural significance and how they're used in everyday dishes.
Prepare Kimchi-buchimgae (kimchi pancake). Get hands-on as you make this crispy, savory pancake which is one of Korea’s most beloved comfort foods, made with aged kimchi and a perfect pan-seared crunch.
Cook a classic stir-fried dish. Learn techniques for bringing balance and boldness to a traditional stir-fried favorite using seasonal vegetables and a rich, umami-forward sauce.
Make Baek-kimchi (white kimchi). Explore a milder, refreshing take on Korea’s signature dish. You'll create Baek-kimchi, a non-spicy version known for its subtle, clean flavors and crisp texture.
Sip on traditional Makgeolli (Korean rice wine). Raise a glass of creamy, lightly sparkling Makgeolli, Korea’s traditional fermented rice wine which perfectly pairs with your homemade dishes.
Enjoy a surprise Secret Dish. Every Secret Food Tour experience ends with something unexpected. Yours will be a special local bite revealed only to guests. It’s the perfect way to finish your kimchi cooking class in Seoul!
Upgrade your Seoul Secret Cooking Class with a wine glass chosen to pair with the food you'll be served. You must be 18 and older and have a valid ID. This upgrade can only be purchased in addition to the food tour.
A glass of Wine

White Kimchi(Baek-kimchi) / Non Spicy

A glass of Makgeolli, or a soda
Meeting Spot
We meet at the Third floor, 36 Jahamun-ro 7-gil, Jongno District, Seoul. From Exit 2 of Gyeongbokgung Station, walk straight about 200m until you see Woori Bank, then turn left. Pass by the famous bar Cham, and you will find your destination on the 3rd floor of the building that has Cuisine La Cle restaurant on the 1st floor. If you have any questions, please [email us](mailto: seoul@secrettours.com).
3rd Floor - 36 Jahamun-ro 7-gil, Jongno District, Seoul
[See on Google Maps](https://maps.app.goo.gl/AT5ocPAo4KwmV7do6)
Monday - Sunday 11:00 am - 5 pm
Your guide will be waiting with an orange umbrella so they are easy to spot.
## WHY SEOUL’S CITY CENTER AND GYEONGBOKGUNG PALACE AREA?
The city center of Seoul is one of the most vibrant and dynamic areas of the capital. This lively district is home to bustling markets filled with colorful arrays of fresh produce, seafood, and traditional Korean delicacies. As you explore, you’ll find charming artisan shops, a thriving café scene, captivating street art, and a palpable sense of community that defines modern Seoul.
The area surrounding Gyeongbokgung Palace is a must-visit for anyone looking to experience the cultural heart of the city. As the historic epicenter of Korea’s Joseon Dynasty, this iconic neighborhood offers a fascinating blend of old and new. Our guided experience will take you through traditional hanok villages, picturesque alleyways, and nearby landmarks that showcase Korea’s rich heritage and its seamless integration with contemporary urban life.
This location is perfect for immersing yourself in Seoul’s unique charm and gaining a deeper understanding of its history and culture.
[\\
BOOK NOW!](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/seoul/cooking-classes/#BOOKING)

## What you'll do
[**THIS TOUR IS NO LONGER RUNNING. PLEASE REVIEW OUR OTHER BOSTON FOOD TOURS. ⤴**](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/boston)
On our Secret Food Tour: Boston, you'll savor the freshest seafood and the famous Italian dishes that have been a staple in the North End for the past 100 years. As you explore the vibrant culinary scene, you will learn about the city's 400-year history, one bite at a time. On this tour, you'll sample famous clam chowder, a fresh lobster roll, delightful Arancini, a classic Chicken Parmesan sandwich, and a mouth-watering dessert. Plus, don't forget our Secret Dish!
Food will be served with water when available. Or if you prefer, a thoughtfully curated [Upgraded Drinks Package](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/boston/upgraded-drinks-package-harvard) is available for purchase.
### SEE ITINERARY
We'll begin in bustling Harvard Square, the epicenter of Harvard University and its surrounding neighborhood.
First, you'll enjoy a warm New England popover at a historic luncheonette with hidden ties to the past.
Then, we'll take a walk through Harvard Yard, where you'll experience a taste of what it's like to attend America's most famous university.
Next, you'll savor a scrumptious fried clam po' boy at a popular local seafood joint while learning about the dish's roots in nearby Essex, MA.
Along the way, you'll hear stories of some of the neighborhood's most famous residents and admire historic monuments and buildings, some dating back over 300 years.
After that, it's time to chow down on a hot slice from every Harvard student's favorite pizza joint.
Of course, no visit to one of America's oldest cities would be complete without stopping by an old graveyard or two.
And finally, you'll cap things off with a decadent Boston cream pie donut from one of the city's most popular donut shops.
As with all our tours, there's also our delicious Secret Dish.

## WHY HARVARD SQUARE?
Harvard Square isn't just the centerpiece of a famous university—it is one of the quintessential cornerstones of American history. Not only was this area one of the first Puritan settlements in the New World, but it was also the birthplace of George Washington's Continental Army, whose victories ultimately led to American independence. Over the years, this neighborhood has attracted its fair share of famous residents, including Franklin Delano Roosevelt, T.S. Eliot, E.E. Cummings, Julia Child, and John Lithgow. It is an intellectual and offbeat area that seamlessly blends history and learning with contemporary arts and entertainment—all while maintaining its quaint small-town charm. And, yes, it is also the epicenter of prestigious Harvard University, where students keep the neighborhood alive and thriving while honoring its storied past.
So, whether you're a history lover or a foodie at heart, Harvard Square promises to be an unforgettable experience, offering a snapshot of Americana around every corner.

title: What you'll do
text:
## What you'll do
On our Secret Food Tour: Phoenix, you'll beat the heat while exploring the coolest neighborhood in the Valley of the Sun—Roosevelt Row.
Our experienced guides will lead you on an eclectic and colorful journey through downtown Phoenix's vibrant arts district, affectionately known as "RoRo" by locals. Along the way, you'll indulge in savory Sonoran specialties, award-winning brewpub bites, and innovative indigenous treats. As you savor each dish, you'll discover why this desert city has rapidly become one of America’s top-tier foodie destinations, all while admiring larger-than-life murals crafted by some of Phoenix’s most celebrated artists. Roosevelt Row is the heart of the city's creative scene, where the past and present converge to create a dynamic, flavor-filled urban experience.
Food will be served with water when available. Or if you prefer, a thoughtfully curated [Upgraded Drinks Package](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/phoenix/upgraded-drinks-package/) is available for purchase.
### SEE ITINERARY
We'll begin in front of the towering Welcome to Roosevelt Row art installation, the gateway to Phoenix's vibrant, walkable arts district.
First, you'll discover what makes Sonoran cuisine unique as you savor a flavorful carne asada taco on a warm, handmade flour tortilla.
Then, it's time to indulge in an award-winning Wagyu steak burger, perfectly paired with decadent duck fat French fries.
As we stroll through the neighborhood, you'll take in the colorful murals and street art that have transformed this historic district into a kaleidoscope of creativity—even the garbage cans are works of art!
Next, you’ll indulge in a classic slice of pizza from Naples, Italy—the birthplace of pizza—enhanced with a distinctive Southwestern twist.
Next stop, is a local favorite in Arizonan Asian flair. These young ladies are making a strong name for themselves within the city they love.
Finally, you'll cool down with a scoop of handcrafted, small-batch artisan gelato in the lobby of an art-filled boutique hotel.
As with all our tours, there's also our delicious Secret Dish!

## WHY ROOSEVELT ROW?
Roosevelt Row (aka "RoRo") isn’t just a historic street in the heart of downtown Phoenix—it’s the city’s cultural soul. This vibrant neighborhood is known for its quirky boutiques, technicolor murals, and eclectic mix of bars and restaurants, making it a must-visit destination that perfectly embodies Phoenix’s creative and ever-evolving spirit. It also boasts a diverse nightlife scene, featuring everything from video game and ping pong bars to jazz clubs and Broadway shows. .
Whether you're an art lover, a fashionista, or a foodie at heart, Roosevelt Row offers an unforgettable experience, providing a glimpse into Phoenix’s rich history while showcasing its dynamic, forward-thinking charm.
[\\
BOOK NOW!](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/phoenix/food-tours-phoenix/#BOOKING)
## Frequently Asked Questions
How do I order?
That is very easy! Go to our "Book Now" page, where we detail our tours. Select your tour and the time of your tour and book it! Are you looking for something special or are you organizing an event? Just email us at [Group & Private Tours](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/private-bookings) and we will do our best to arrange something that suits you. After your booking is made, we will send you an automatic e-mail confirmation. If you have any questions before booking, feel free to contact us via email
\*Please note if you are using a special promo code then enter it in the **"Voucher Code"** section before you select the amount of tickets you would like to purchase\*
What is included in the food tour?
All the delicious food and drinks mentioned above, but if you want more alcohol (and who doesn't?) we offer an [upgraded drinks package](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/phoenix/upgraded-drink-package/) that gives you a refreshing frozen cocktail, local craft beer, and an indigenous coffee drink.
Where is the meeting spot?
You can find the [meeting spot here](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/phoenix/food-tours-phoenix/#CONTACT) and if it's not clear you can always contact us.
The meeting spot is in front of the "Welcome to Roosevelt Row" Art Installation at 695 E Roosevelt St, Phoenix, AZ 85006.
If you are using a GPS, the address is: Art Installation at 695 E Roosevelt St, Phoenix, AZ 85006
[»»CLICK HERE FOR DIRECTIONS««](https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d3887.7630586359846!2d-112.06794022389172!3d33.45833754885587!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x872b1339231bd66d%3A0xeda7c40f4dc4a709!2s%22Welcome%20to%20Roosevelt%20Row%22%20Art%20Installation!5e1!3m2!1sen!2sin!4v1741152945605!5m2!1sen!2sin)
Where the tour will end?
The Phoenix tour ends inside the FOUND:RE Phoenix Hotel, located at 1100 N Central Ave, Phoenix, AZ 85004.
Is your food tour suitable for a vegetarian or someone with other dietary requirements?
Due to the nature of creating a well-balanced and thoughtful gastronomy experience, many of our tours are unable to accommodate certain dietary restrictions. Please contact us at [phoenix@secrettours.com](mailto:phoenix@secrettours.com) prior to booking your tour to see if we are able to accommodate your dietary needs.
I am traveling with my family, is the tour ok for infants/children?
Children are more than welcome to our tour and it's free for any child 2 years or under! We have had many families attend from all over the world and everyone enjoyed the tour.
I don't drink alcohol. Can I book your tour?
This is not a problem. Just inform our guide before the tour starts. During the tasting you can select another beverage you like!
Is there enough food during your tour?
We give enough food to all our customers. Trust us: you will not need to go to the restaurant after the food tour!
Where do I add my discount voucher?
I would like to take your tour but it is already fully booked. Is there a way I can do the tour?
Our tours are often sold out very quickly. If the date you requested is not available, please do not hesitate to email us and we can see if there is anything we can do.
Is there a lot of walking?
To join our food tour, you must wear comfortable shoes. There will be around 45 minutes walking but it's not too difficult and there are no hills or stairs. If you walk slowly, then our guide will walk slowly as well.
How many people max are on this tour?
We take 12 people maximum. If you are more than 12 people, please do not hesitate to email us and will try to see if we can accommodate.
I cannot find a way to print the confirmation. Is it OK if I have it on my phone?
You do not have to print your voucher. A confirmation on your phone will be fine!
If I purchase a voucher as a gift, or am given a voucher how long is it valid for?
All of our vouchers expire one year from the date of purchase.
Can I choose my own cheese and meat?
Our guide will take care of everything. Should you wish to try something special, please inform our guide and he will do his best to make you happy.
Where does your food come from?
We work with small shops in the Phoenix area. The food and beer we buy is top-quality, fresh and local!
What if it rains or I change my plans?
Unfortunately, the weather is unpredictable in Phoenix. Bring an umbrella and we will try to be more indoors than out. We do not issue refunds as per our terms and conditions. We also inform you that we never cancel a booking even if we have only 2 people! However we do reserve the right to cancel the tour if we feel the weather is extreme, and we cannot run the tour due to this for more info see our [Terms and Conditions](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/terms-and-conditions/).
Can I pay the tour in cash?
You must book directly on our website. We do not accept cash payments. Our online payment is safe, secured and SSL protected.
Why do we need to pay for a booking fee?
The booking fee that you have to pay is up to our ticket provider and we can't change it. All our clients need to pay for it upon booking. The booking fee charged contributes to the cost of the ticketing system to provide an excellent service to our customers.
Foreign Transaction Fees
A few banks have charged their customer an extra fee while booking with us (this isn't the booking fee but another fee added by the bank). We think this is unfair, if this happens let us know by showing us in your bank statement and we will refund this fee as a gesture of good will.
Are the food tours wheelchair and/or stroller accessible?
Many of our tours are not wheelchair or stroller accessible. We recommend contacting us before booking to discuss this specific tour and accessibility options.
What is the lowest price guarantee?
We always offer the lowest price on our Secret Food Tours. If you find one of our food tours listed at a lower price, contact us and we'll match it.
## READY TO TASTE THE REAL Phoenix?

text:
# Malaga Food Tours

# Malaga Food Tours
 Skip the overpriced tourist traps
 Uncover the city's history and culture
 Exclusive food tours in over 90 cities worldwide
Discover Malaga with our top-rated guided food tour, which takes you to delicious, lesser-known food spots loved by locals
Also recommended by
 3 – 3 ½ hour
 Historic Centre
 7 stops
 12 people max
 English
## What you'll do
On our Secret Food Tour: Malaga, you'll savour the finest local dishes, including traditional Andalusian flavours that highlight the region's rich culinary heritage. Your tour begins in the heart of the historical city centre (Centro Histórico), where you'll indulge in a local sweet. From there, we’ll take you to the vibrant Atarazanas Market, where you’ll explore stalls brimming with fresh produce, seafood, and local specialties, immersing yourself in the sights, sounds, and aromas of Malaga’s food culture. Prepare yourself for an exceptional culinary journey where you’ll discover the true essence of Malaga’s cuisine and experience the local dining scene like never before.
Quality drinks will be served at some stops, however if you would like more, a thoughtfully curated [Upgraded Drinks Package](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/malaga/upgraded-drinks-package/) is available.
### SEE ITINERARY
You'll start at a historic bakery dating back to 1930, where you’ll indulge in a beloved local sweet.
A few steps later, you’ll arrive at the Atarazanas Market, where you’ll have the chance to explore and taste the diversity of Malaga’s gastronomy. Inside this vibrant market, you’ll sample different extra virgin olive oils, a staple of Andalusian cuisine, as well as various types of olives and almonds, each offering unique flavours and textures. Soak in the lively atmosphere of this historic landmark while indulging in these local delicacies.
Discover a historic taberna and the rich, sweet flavours of Malaga’s wine. Sip and savour this beloved regional specialty in an authentic setting, immersing yourself in Malaga’s vibrant culinary tradition.
Next, we’ll visit a local deli, where you’ll have the opportunity to savour an array of exquisite cured meats, including premium Iberian ham, flavourful salami, and a unique chorizo.
You'll dine at a lively restaurant with a unique vibe inspired by Holy Week (Semana Santa) and the brotherhoods (cofradías), surrounded by religious decorations and a festive atmosphere that captures the vibrant spirit of Malaga’s traditions.
Finish your tour at a historic gem, where you’ll enjoy a true ‘Malaga-flavoured’ gelato, made with local ingredients, and savour the sweet taste of Malaga’s traditions in every scoop.
As with all our tours, there's also a delicious Secret Dish.
When you purchase our Upgrade Package, you'll enjoy the following drinks, in addition to the ones already served on the tour:
Malaga wine
White wine
[ADD UPGRADED DRINKS PACKAGE](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/malaga/upgraded-drinks-package/)
\*Please note: the itinerary and menu is subject to change, based on the locations' availability, weather, and other circumstances.
\*Please note: We can’t accommodate pets on our food tours.
-hd.jpg&w=1080&q=75)
Book Your Tour
€79.99 / person
Lowest price guarantee
If you have any issues with payment, please email us at [contact@secrettours.com](mailto:contact@secrettours.com) with the city, date and time of tour, and how many adult and child's tickets you need so we can assist you.

Meeting Spot
We'll meet at the Plaza Enrique García-Herrera. If you have any questions. If you have any questions. Please [email us](mailto:malaga@secrettours.com). Our guide will have an orange umbrella and a huge smile.
Plaza Enrique García-Herrera
[See on Google Maps](https://maps.app.goo.gl/yX7FH9WVg347cEG97)
Monday - Saturday 11:00 a.m.
Your guide will be waiting with an orange umbrella so they are easy to spot.
## WHY MALAGA?
If you're a passionate food enthusiast and an adventurous traveler, Malaga is a must-visit destination. As a culinary gem, Malaga offers a rich tapestry of flavours, blending centuries-old traditions with the freshness of the Mediterranean to create unforgettable dining experiences. Immerse yourself in the vibrant culture and storied history of this city, where each dish tells a tale of its own.
From the crispy delight of berenjenas con miel (fried eggplant with molasses) to the savoury bite of gazpacho, and the refreshing taste of Malaga’s wine, the city's gastronomic scene promises to captivate your taste buds and leave you craving more. Explore the unique blend of Andalusian and coastal influences that shape Malaga’s cuisine, and let the warmth and hospitality of its people enchant you as you indulge in a culinary journey like no other.
[\\
BOOK NOW!](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/malaga/malaga-food-tour/#BOOKING)
## Frequently Asked Questions
How do I order?
That is very easy! Go to our "Book Now" page, where we detail our tours. Select your tour and the time of your tour and book it! Are you looking for something special or are you organizing an event? Just email us at [Group & Private Tours](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/private-bookings) and we will do our best to arrange something that suits you. After your booking is made, we will send you an automatic e-mail confirmation. If you have any questions before booking, feel free to contact us via email
\*Please note if you are using a special promo code then enter it in the **"Voucher Code"** section before you select the amount of tickets you would like to purchase\*
What is included in the food tour?
All the delicious food and drinks mentioned above, but if you want to upgrade your experience with a premium coffee and alcoholic cocktails, you can! We offer an [upgraded drinks package](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/malaga/upgraded-drinks-package/) for purchase as well.
Where is the meeting spot?
You can find the [meeting spot here](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/malaga/malaga-food-tour/#CONTACT) and if it's not clear you can always contact us.
We'll meet at the Plaza Enrique García-Herrera.
Where the tour will end?
The tour finish next to Málaga Roman Theatre
Is your food tour suitable for a vegetarian or someone with other dietary requirements?
Due to the nature of creating a well-balanced and thoughtful gastronomy experience, many of our tours are unable to accommodate certain dietary restrictions. Please contact us at [malaga@secrettours.com](mailto:malaga@secrettours.com) prior to booking your tour to see if we are able to accommodate your dietary needs.
I am traveling with my family, is the tour ok for infants/children?
Children are more than welcome to our tour and it's free for any child 2 years or under! We have had many families attend from all over the world and everyone enjoyed the tour.
I don't drink alcohol. Can I book your tour?
This is not a problem. Just inform our guide before the tour starts.
Is there enough food during your tour?
Think of the tour as a tasting menu. As we travel you get many delicious treats that comprise a meal with dessert. But there is a lot of food, so you will not be hungry after the tour.
Where do I add my discount voucher?
I would like to take your tour but it is already fully booked. Is there a way I can do the tour?
Our tours are often sold out very quickly. If the date you requested is not available, please do not hesitate to email us and we can see if there is anything we can do.
Is there a lot of walking?
To join our food tour, you must wear comfortable shoes. There will be around 25 mins of walking but it is not too difficult and is broken up between food stops. During the duration of the tour we will walk just over 1,5 kilometers. The guide walks at the pace of the tour members, you will never be rushed.
How many people max are on this tour?
We take 12 people maximum. If you are more than 12 people, please do not hesitate to email us and we will try to see if we can accommodate.
I cannot find a way to print the confirmation. Is it OK if I have it on my phone?
You do not have to print your voucher. A confirmation on your phone will be fine!
If I purchase a voucher as a gift, or am given a voucher how long is it valid for?
All of our vouchers expire one year from the date of purchase.
Can I choose my own cheese and meat?
Our guide will take care of everything. Should you wish to try something special, please inform our guide and they will do their best to make you happy.
Where does your food come from?
The food and drinks are top-quality, fresh and local!
What if it rains or I change my plans?
Unfortunately, the weather is unpredictable in Malaga. We do not issue refunds as per our terms and conditions. We also inform you that we never cancel a booking even if we have only 2 people! However we do reserve the right to cancel the tour if we feel the weather is extreme, and we cannot run the tour due to this for more info see our [Terms and Conditions](https://www.secretfoodtours.com/terms-and-conditions/).
Can I pay the tour in cash?
You must book directly on our website. We do not accept cash payments. Our online payment is safe, secured and SSL protected.
Why do we need to pay for a booking fee?
The booking fee that you have to pay is up to our ticket provider and we can't change it. All our clients need to pay for it upon booking. The booking fee charged contributes to the cost of the ticketing system to provide an excellent service to our customers.
Foreign Transaction Fees
A few banks have charged their customer an extra fee while booking with us (this isn't the booking fee but another fee added by the bank). We think this is unfair, if this happens let us know by showing us in your bank statement and we will refund this fee as a gesture of good will.
Are the food tours wheelchair and/or stroller accessible?
Many of our tours are not wheelchair or stroller accessible. We recommend contacting us before booking to discuss this specific tour and accessibility options.
What is the lowest price guarantee?
We always offer the lowest price on our Secret Food Tours. If you find one of our food tours listed at a lower price, contact us and we'll match it.
## READY TO TASTE THE REAL Malaga?

On our Secret Food Tour; Phuket, discover the finest of the bold, aromatic, and deeply authentic flavours that make Southern Thai cuisine. Follow your Thai foodie expert in true local style across Phuket's colourful historic old town Tasting your way across this foodie paradise. Visit bustling morning markets and learn what ingredients go into your favourite dishes, join the market workers at truly local breakfast spots, have a go at making traditional desserts at a 4th generation family bakery, marvel at delicious historic food stalls and dine in Michelin guide restaurants.

## Why Phuket Old Town?
Phuket Old Town is a vibrant blend of history, culture, and incredible flavors. Unlike the island’s famous beaches, this charming district takes you on a journey through time, where colorful Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling markets, michelin guide food stalls and hidden street food gems create an unforgettable experience. From rich, aromatic curries to fresh seafood and traditional Thai sweets, every bite tells a story of Phuket’s diverse heritage from Chinese, Malay and Burmese influences. Phuket Old town really is the beating heart of Southern Thailand's world famous food scene. Join us as we explore the heart of the island through its most authentic and delicious dishes!
